accountDateOpened.description: The date the liability was originated

accountIdentifier.description: Unique account identifier for the liability. This value could either be the entire account number, the last 4 digits, or a masked version with a visible last 4 digits

accountInDisputeIndicator.description: Indicates if the borrower disputed this liability

accountReportedDate.description: The date that the credit liability data was reported by the liability holder

accountStatus.description: The status of the liability account as of the Account Status Date

additionHousingExpensesMonthlyPayment.description: If the monthly mortgage payment does not include all housing expenses, this is the amount of housing expenses paid monthly outside of the monthly mortgage payment

agencyCaseNumber.description: The case number for this government loan

alimonyPayeeName.description: Who is getting paid the alimony

amortizationType.description: The amortization type for this loan

associatedProperty.description: A reference to the property on the loan that this liability is a lien against

balloonIndicator.description: Indicates whether this loan had a balloon payment

baseLoanAmount.description: Base loan amount excluding any financed mortgage insurance premium, funding fees, or guarantee fees

borrowersNotOnSubjectLoan.description: The names of the individuals who were on this loan but are not borrowers on the subject loan

constructionLoanIndicator.description: Indicates that this loan is for new construction

couldTakePrecedenceOverFirstMortgageIndi.description: Indicates that this is a liability that could get precedence in the event of default on the first mortgage. Typically for liens such as tax liens, PACE loans, etc

creditLiability120DaysLateCount.description: Number of times the liability account was reported 120 days late by the liability holder

creditLiability30DaysLateCount.description: Number of times the liability account was reported 30 days late by the liability holder

creditLiability60DaysLateCount.description: Number of times the liability account was reported 60 days late by the liability holder

creditLiability90DaysLateCount.description: Number of times the liability account was reported 90 days late by the liability holder

creditorBusinessType.description: The type of business of the liability holder

creditorEmailAddress.description: The best email address to contact the creditor

creditorName.description: The name of the party to whom the liability is owned. Often a financial institution

creditorPhoneNumber.description: The best phone number to contact the creditor

creditReportRemarks.description: Remarks about this liability from the credit report

currentRate.description: The current rate on this loan

dailyAccruedInterestAmount.description: The amount of interest accrued daily on the liability. Used for liabilities being paid off at closing to help adjust payoff amount when closing date moves

debtToIncome.description: The DTI that was used to originate this loan

escrowBalanceAmount.description: The remaining balance in the escrow account for this loan. A positive value indicates an escrow surplus; a negative value indicates an escrow shortage

exclusionIndicator.description: Indicates that the liability should be excluded from the DTI calculation

exclusionReasonType.description: Explains why the liability should be excluded from the DTI calculation

expenseDescription.description: Free form text to describe the expense

fhaEndorsementDate.description: The date the FHA loan was endorsed by HUD

financedMIP.description: The amount of mortgage insurance premium financed into this loan

firstPaymentDate.description: The date of the first payment on this loan

fromSameLenderIndicator.description: Indicates whether this loan was originated by the same lender

highBalance.description: The highest the balance of this liability has been in the previous year, as reflected on the credit report

holderLoanNumber.description: The loan number assigned by the holder of this loan

interestOnlyIndicator.description: Indicates whether this loan allowed interest-only payments to be made

interestPaidThroughDate.description: Date through which interest is paid on the current loan payment

isExpense.description: Indiciates whether or not the liability type is classified as an expense

isQualifyingLiability.description: Indicates if the liability is applicable for qualification, based on having a non-zero UPB, a non-zero monthly payment on a revolving credit line, or being a HELOC

lastActivityDate.description: The date of last account activity, such as last charge or last payment

lenderLoanNumber.description: The loan number assigned by the originating lender

liabilityType.description: The type of liability, such as a mortgage, installment loan, etc

loanModificationIndicator.description: Indicates whether the existing loan has been modified

loanTerm.description: The total loan term, in months, for this loan

loanToValue.description: The loan-to-value (LTV) ratio used to originate this loan

maturityDate.description: The date when the existing liability was scheduled to be paid in full as reflected on the original note

monthlyPaymentAmount.description: The amount the borrower must pay monthly to service the liability

monthlyPaymentIncludesHomeInsuranceIndic.description: Indicates whether the monthly mortgage payment amount includes escrowed homeowner’s insurance, or if that insurance must be added separately

monthlyPaymentIncludesOtherHousingExpens.description: Indicates whether the monthly mortgage payment amount includes other escrowed housing expenses beyond taxes and insurance. This should not include mortgage insurance (if applicable) or HOA dues; if not included, those expenses must be added separately

monthlyPaymentIncludesPropertyTaxesIndic.description: Indicates whether the monthly mortgage payment amount includes escrowed property taxes, or if those taxes must be added separately

monthsReviewed.description: The number of months of account history reported by the liability holder

mortgageCurrentHolder.description: The investor who currently holds the mortgage

mortgageInsurancePremiumRate.description: The annual rate as a percent of the mortgage insurance premium

mortgageLienType.description: The lien type of this existing mortgage

mortgageType.description: Type of mortgage (conventional, FHA, etc) for an existing liability

mostRecentLate120Date.description: Most recent date that the account had a 120 day late payment

mostRecentLate30Date.description: Most recent date that the account had a 30 day late payment

mostRecentLate60Date.description: Most recent date that the account had a 60 day late payment

mostRecentLate90Date.description: Most recent date that the account had a 90 day late payment

nextPaymentDueDate.description: The date of the next payment due on the mortgage; only shows for mortgage liabilities

nonTraditionalCreditIndicator.description: Indicates that this liability is being self reported to establish alternative credit history

nonTraditionalCreditReferenceIndividualF.description: Full name of the person providing the reference with respect to the alternative credit - that it was extended and paid promptly

nonTraditionalCreditType.description: The type of alternative credit - eg rent, phone bills, etc

noteAmount.description: The original note amount of this loan

noteDate.description: The date the note for this loan was executed

noteRate.description: The interest rate stated on the note for this loan

originalCreditorName.description: The name of the party to whom the liability was originated by. Often a financial institution

otherExpenseType.description: Further description of the expense type if not in the list of expense types

otherLiabilityType.description: Further description of the liability type if not in the list of liability types

pastDueAmount.description: The amount that the borrower is currently past due

paymentStatus.description: The payment status of the liability - whether it is current or delinquent, and if delinquent, how delinquent

payoffAmount.description: This is the amount required to pay off the liability to zero. This should not be used to fill in an amount that partially pays off the liability.

payoffAmountMetadata.description: Metadata tracking the computed and override values for the payoff amount

payoffBeforeClosingIndicator.description: Indicates that this liability is to be paid off before closing, and therefore can be excluded from DTI. This should be used to subtract the unpaid balance from available assets.

payoffBuydownCreditAmount.description: Credit applied to reduce the borrower’s payoff balance from remaining buydown funds held in escrow or subsidy accounts

payoffDailyAccruedInterestAdjustmentBetw.description: The amount of interest accrued between the loan disbursement date and the payoff good-through date, calculated using the daily accrued interest amount. This value is negative if the loan disburses before the payoff good-through date, and positive if it disburses after

payoffDemandGoodThroughDate.description: Date that the payoff demand is valid through

payoffDemandRequestDate.description: Date the payoff demand was requested

payoffInterestThroughGoodThroughDateAmou.description: The interest amount included on the payoff statement through the payoff "good through" date

payoffLateChargeAmount.description: Late charges showing on the payoff

payoffLenderSpecifiedAdditionalInterestA.description: Dollar amount of accrued interest added to the payoff calculation, derived from the lender-specified additional days

payoffLenderSpecifiedAdditionalInterestD.description: Number of lender-specified additional days of interest applied to the payoff amount
Metadata tracking the computed and override values for the lender-specified additional interest days

payoffLienReleaseFeeAmount.description: Fees for releasing liens or collateral associated with the loan payoff

payoffOtherAmount.description: Miscellaneous payoff adjustments not covered by other payoff components. A positive value increases the total payoff amount; a negative value decreases it

payoffProRataMIPAmount.description: Prorated mortgage insurance premium due at payoff

payoffRecordingFeeAmount.description: Recording fees added to the payoff

planToPayoffIndicator.description: Indicates that this liability is to be paid off at closing, and therefore can be excluded from DTI. This will add the unpaid balance to cash to close.

prepaymentPenaltyAmount.description: The dollar amount of any prepayment penalty on this loan

prepaymentPenaltyIndicator.description: Indicates whether the loan includes a penalty charged to the borrower in the event of prepayment

principalAndInterestMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly principal and interest amount for this liability, excluding any escrowed items such as property taxes, homeowner's insurance, mortgage insurance, or other housing expenses

principalAndInterestMonthlyPaymentMetada.description: Metadata tracking the computed and override values for the principal and interest monthly payment

programName.description: The name of the loan program under which this loan was originated

purposeType.description: The purpose for which this loan was originated

refinanceCashOutDeterminationType.description: The refinance type indicating whether cash was taken out

remainingTermMonths.description: Computed remaining term in months (UPB / monthly payment), with 3-decimal precision

remainingTermMonthsMetadata.description: Metadata tracking the computed and override values for the remaining term

remainingTermNumberOfMonths.description: The number of months until the liability must be repaid in full

reportedHistory.description: The reported delinquency history of the liability as reflected on the credit report

revolvingCreditLimitAmount.description: For certain liability types that are revolving credit lines, the maximum balance that the line can be drawn to

subordinateFinancingBelowMarketIndicator.description: Indicates that the subordinate financing was previously offered at a below market rate, for example as a seller incentive

subordinateFinancingOriginallyUsedToPurc.description: Indicates that the subordinate financing was used to purchase the property. If the subordinate financing is being refinanced, this characterization determines whether the refinance is a cash-out or not

subordinateFinancingToSubjectMortgageInd.description: Indicates that the liability is subordinate to the first mortgage on the home.

subordinateFinancingType.description: The type of subordinate financing - e.g. community seconds loan

subordinationAgreementMaximumLoanAmount.description: The maximum loan amount per subordination agreement

texasRefinanceType.description: The Texas refinance classification for this loan

timeframe.description: Whether this liability is a past liability, current liability, or future (proposed) liability

titleLienOrderStatus.description: The status of the title lien order for subordination or payoff processing with title providers

unpaidBalanceAmount.description: The total balance outstanding on the liability

unusedEscrowAuthorizationIndicator.description: Indicates whether the borrower has authorized applying of any positive escrow balance on this liability toward its payoff.

usdaDirectLoanIndicator.description: Indicates whether this loan was a USDA direct loan

$action.description: Only used for adding and removing items from a collection

reportedStatus.description: The payment status reported for the liability during this time period

yearMonth.description: The year and month when the liability report value was recorded

acquisitionCost.description: For construction loans, this is the sum of the cost of construction improvement costs and cost of the lot. Otherwise, this is the sum of purchase price, energy improvements and renovation costs.

actingAsAttorneyFor.description: Acting as attorney on transaction for:

actingAsRealEstateBroker.description: Acting as real estate broker on transaction

actingAsRealEstateBrokerFor.description: Acting as real estate broker on transaction for:

actualCloseOfEscrowDate.description: The actual close of escrow date

actualCloseOfEscrowDateMetadata.description: Metadata for the actual close of escrow date computed field.

actualDisbursementDate.description: Date the loan funds were actually disbursed.

additionalRefinanceBenefits.description: Benefits associated with the loan. Used for net tangible benefit tests.

adverseActionInitialSentDate.description: Date the first denial Adverse Action Notice was sent to the borrower

affiliatedBusinessDisclosureInitialSentD.description: Date the first Affiliated Business Disclosure was sent to the borrower

affordableLoanIndicator.description: Indicates that this loan is an affordable loan

allBorrowerHasRequiredInfoForDisclosure.description: All borrowers have required info for disclosure including full name, email, and tax identifier

allocatedCashToClose.description: The amount of assets that the borrower has and are allocated toward cash to close. All qualified assets are allocated toward cash to close if the required cash to close amount has not yet been met.

allocatedLenderCredit.description: The total amount of lender credit allocated towards closing costs

alternativeLoanLevelCreditScoreCalculati.description: The method used to calculate the loan level credit score across multiple borrowers. If this field is null, the loan level credit score is calculated as the lowest median credit score of the borrowers.

antiSteeringSafeHarborInitialSentDate.description: Date the first Anti-Steering Safe Harbor Disclosure was sent to the borrower

applicableConformingLoanLimitAmount.description: The applicable conforming loan limit based on property county, number of units, and mortgage type

appraisalContingencyDate.description: Last day that the buyer can back out of a purchase due to appraisal issues, as specified in the purchase contract.

appraisalDisclosureInitialSentDate.description: Date the first Notice of Right to Receive Written Copy of Appraisal was sent to the borrower

appraisalInitialSentDate.description: Date the appraisal was sent to the borrower

appraisalManagementCompanies.description: A list of the appraisal management company file contacts on the loan

appraisalReviewerCHUMSId.description: The six character identifier of the FHA-approved appraiser

appraisalWaivers.description: Indicates which appraisal waiver programs, such as FNMA PIW or FMAC ACE, this loan is eligible for. This field is automatically populated based on AUS results

assetsUsableOnlyTowardCashToCloseAmount.description: The amount of assets that can only be used toward the required cash to close, not reserves.  Uses qualified amounts when available and falls back to stated asset values when a qualified amount is not provided.

assignedUsers.description: The users assigned to this loan for processing, underwriting, and other tasks

assumptionVaEntitlementSubstitutionIndic.description: Indicates whether there is a substitution of VA entitlement for the assumption

assuranceOfCompletionAmount.description: The amount of assurance of completion required for FHA loans on HUD form 92800.5B

ausResponses.description: A list of all of the AUS runs and responses that have previously been run

baseGuarantyFeePercent.description: The guaranty fee rate prior to applying any adjustments, such as buyup/buydown. This can be specified in a price sheet, commitment, or other agreement. The guaranty fee is a portion of the interest on the loan that is paid to a party to ensure the timely payment of principal and interest to the holders of securities backed by the loan.

bonaFideEmergencyWaitingPeriodWaiverIndi.description: Did the borrower waive their waiting period due to a bona fide personal emergency?

borrowerCount.description: The number of borrowers on the loan

borrowerDeclinedAppraisalWaiver.description: Indicates whether the borrower declined an appraisal waiver

borrowerDeclinedTitleWaiver.description: Indicates whether the borrower declined a title waiver

borrowerDidShopForTitleIndicator.description: This will override the 'Did shop for' indicator on all title closing costs

borrowerInitialEscrowPaymentClosingCosts.description: The portion of the closing costs that the borrower has paid before closing, specifically for initial escrow payments

borrowerOriginationChargesClosingCostsPa.description: The origination charges related to closing costs that the borrower has paid prior to the closing event

borrowerOtherClosingCostsPaidBeforeClosi.description: The amount of other closing costs, not including points and fees, that the borrower paid before the closing date

borrowerPaidInitialEscrowPaymentClosingC.description: The initial escrow payment at closing that is paid by the borrower
An estimate of the initial escrow payment costs that the borrower is expected to pay at closing

borrowerPaidOriginationChargesClosingCos.description: The origination charges related to closing costs that are paid by the borrower
An estimate of the origination charges that the borrower is expected to pay at closing

borrowerPaidOtherClosingCosts.description: The sum of other closing costs, typically those that are optional, that the borrower is responsible for paying

borrowerPaidOtherClosingCostsEstimate.description: An estimate of other closing costs, typically those that are optional, that the borrower is expected to pay

borrowerPaidPrepaidsClosingCosts.description: The amount of prepaid closing costs that the borrower is responsible for, including items such as insurance and taxes

borrowerPaidPrepaidsClosingCostsEstimate.description: An estimate of the prepaid closing costs that the borrower is expected to pay

borrowerPaidTaxesAndGovernmentFeesClosin.description: The total amount of taxes and government fees related to closing costs that the borrower is responsible for
Estimated taxes and government fees that the borrower is expected to pay as part of the closing costs

borrowerPaidThirdPartyServicesClosingCos.description: The total amount paid by the borrower for third-party services related to closing, such as title insurance and appraisal fees
An estimate of the closing costs for services provided by third parties, which are expected to be paid by the borrower

borrowerPrepaidsClosingCostsPaidBeforeCl.description: The amount of prepaid closing costs that the borrower has paid prior to the closing date

borrowersWillPayTIFromEscrowIndicator.description: Indicates that the borrowers have elected to pay taxes and insurance from escrow. This is a very common option that is relevant for servicing down the line

borrowerTaxesAndGovernmentFeesClosingCos.description: The amount of taxes and government fees related to closing costs that the borrower has paid prior to closing

borrowerThirdPartyServicesClosingCostsPa.description: The amount paid by the borrower for third-party services prior to closing

branchCode.description: The code for the branch that the loan is originated from

branchId.description: The branch that the loan is originated from

branchIdMetadata.description: Metadata for the BranchId computed field

businessPurposeIndicator.description: When true, indicates that the covered loan has a business purpose as specified in the HMDA LAR reporting requirements. Used for HMDA reporting

buyerAttorneys.description: A list of the buyer attorney file contacts on the loan

buyerRealEstateAgents.description: A list of the buyer real estate agent file contacts on the loan

capitalPartners.description: The capital partners associated with the loan

carrierToWarehouse.description: Shipping carrier used to send collateral to the warehouse lender.

cemaLoanIndicator.description: Indicates that this loan is a Consolidation, Extension, and Modification Agreement (CEMA) loan. CEMA loans are only available in New York state.

charmBookletInitialSentDate.description: Date the first CHARM Booklet was sent to the borrower

cityTaxAssessors.description: The city tax assessor(s) for the loan.

cityTaxEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the city taxes are escrowed

cityTaxMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for city taxes

clearedToCloseDate.description: Date the underwriter designated this loan clear to close.

closedEndSubordinateLiensAmount.description: The outstanding amount on all closed-end subordinate liens for the subject property, derived from either liability or concurrent financing. Only applicable to first liens

closingAgents.description: A list of the closing agent file contacts on the loan

closingCosts.description: A list of all of the closing costs on the loan

closingCostsFinanced.description: The amount of closing costs to be included in the mortgage loan

closingCostsFinancedEstimate.description: Estimated amount of closing costs that will be financed as part of the loan amount

closingDate.description: Closing date of the loan. This date is typically used to hold the expected closing date before it occurs, and then to memorialize the date the loan actually closed afterwards

closingDateScheduledIndicator.description: Indicates that closing date is scheduled

closingDisclosureNeedsToBeSentDate.description: Date by which initial closing disclosure needs to be sent - the closing date minus three business days.

closingInstructions.description: Describes the conditions that must be met in order to complete the closing

closingMRIContributionAmount.description: The minimum required investment contributions at closing.

closingPackageSentDate.description: Date the closing package was sent to the borrower

closingSigningMethod.description: The method used to notarize documents for the closing

combinedLoanToValueRatio.description: The base combined loan to value ratio (rounded to 2 decimal places) - the value of all liens on the subject property, including the subject mortgage not including any financed mortgage premium, divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

combinedLoanToValueRatioUnrounded.description: The base combined loan to value ratio (unrounded) - the value of all liens on the subject property, including the subject mortgage not including any financed mortgage premium, divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

committedToInvestorDate.description: Date the mortgage was committed to an investor.

complianceMonitoringStatus.description: Describes the compliance monitoring status for the loan

conditionalCommitmentExpirationDate.description: The date the government agency (e.g. FHA, USDA) conditional commitment for this loan expires

conditionalCommitmentIssuedDate.description: The date the government agency (e.g. FHA, USDA) issued the conditional commitment for this loan

conflictSharedInterests.description: Maps types of conflicts of interest (shared holding company, shared officer, or shared office space) to lists of affected party IDs on the transaction

constructionLoanIndicator.description: Indicates that this loan is for new construction

conversionOfLandContractOrContractForDee.description: Indicates that this loan is to pay off a land contract, e.g. convert it to a regular mortgage

correspondentLenders.description: The correspondent lender(s) (correspondent seller) for the loan.

counterofferExpirationDate.description: Date on which the lender-provided counteroffer expires

counterofferSentDate.description: Date on which lender provided a counteroffer to the borrower because the borrower did not qualify for the terms or product they originally applied for

countyTaxAssessors.description: The county tax assessor(s) for the loan.

creditReportAgencies.description: A list of the credit report agency file contacts on the loan

crmIdentifier.description: Unique identifier used to reference this loan in a CRM system

currentEscrowBalance.description: The amount of money currently in escrow

currentEscrowBalanceMetadata.description: Metadata for the computed field CurrentEscrowBalance

currentLoanStageChangedDate.description: The date when the current loan stage was last updated or modified

currentOutstandingPrincipal.description: The amount of principal left on the loan

custodianCollateralSubmissionDate.description: Captures the date and time the lender attempted to submit the collateral package to the document custodian.

custodianCollateralSubmissionStatus.description: Indicates whether the status of the last submission attempt.

custodianNoteReceivedDate.description: Captures when the document custodian receives the original note from the closing vendor.

custodianNoteStatus.description: The latest status provided by the document custodian.

dateOfLastPayment.description: The date of the last payment made on the loan

dateOfLastPaymentMetadata.description: Metadata for the date of last payment computed field

dateOfNextPayment.description: Indicates when the borrower’s next scheduled payment is due

daysInterestPaidAtFunding.description: The number of days of interest owed to either the lender or the investor after the loan has been purchased

debtToIncomeRatio.description: The overall debt to income ratio for the loan - all monthly debt + housing expenses for all borrowers, divided by total monthly income for all borrowers

debtToIncomeRatioEstimate.description: An estimated debt-to-income ratio calculated from available borrower financial information

delinquentPaymentsOverPastTwelveMonthsCo.description: The number of times during the past twelve months that the payment on the loan was delinquent

dependentCount.description: The number of dependents applicable to this mortgage type

disbursementDate.description: Date the loan funds are scheduled to be disbursed. This is calculated in accordance with the funding type and lender's configuration.

disbursementDateMetadata.description: Metadata for the computed scheduled disbursement date field.

downPaymentAmount.description: Down payment amount for a purchase loan. This field is computed as the purchase price minus the loan amount. Note: when concurrent financing is present, this value reflects the combined financing and may differ from the subject loan's down payment.

downPaymentAssistanceLoanIndicator.description: Indicates whether this loan is a down payment assistance (DPA) loan, typically offered by a state agency, nonprofit, or employer to help eligible borrowers cover their down payment or closing costs

downPaymentPercentage.description: Down payment percentage for a purchase loan. This field is computed as the purchase price minus the loan amount

dscrCalculationMethod.description: Specifies the method used to calculate the Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) based on investor guidelines

earliestAllowedClosingDate.description: Earliest allowed closing date of the loan

earlyPayoffPenalty.description: The penalty charged for paying off the loan before the scheduled maturity date

earnestMoneyDepositAmount.description: The deposit amount that was made as a show of good faith by buyer to bind the conditions of a sale of real estate

earnestMoneyDepositUnsourcedAmount.description: The unsourced portion of the earnest money deposit.

earthquakeInsuranceEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the earthquake insurance is escrowed

earthquakeInsuranceMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for earthquake insurance

ecoaApplicationSubmittedDate.description: The date the application was submitted according to ECOA guidelines

ecoaTriggeredDate.description: ECOA trigger date, currently earliest credit consent date across all borrowers

effectiveAppraisalWaiver.description: The appraisal waiver type currently in effect for the loan based on the automated underwriting system and property data report requirements

effectiveTitleWaivers.description: Indicates the effective title waiver program. This field is automatically populated based on available waivers and selected AUS

eligibleForMaxFinancingIndicator.description: Indicates whether the property is eligible for maximum financing with a high loan-to-value ratio.

energyImprovementAmount.description: The amount of the loan proceeds being spent on energy improvements for the property, including payoff of previous debts incurred for energy improvements

energyImprovementTypes.description: The specific energy improvements being made on the property, such as installation of solar heating/cooling, replacement of a major system, or repayment of a PACE loan

eNoteIndicator.description: Indicates that an eNote is used as part of this loan

escrowAgents.description: A list of the escrow agent file contacts on the loan

escrowAggregateAdjustment.description: The amount of any adjustment made to the initial escrow account balance based on Regulation X requirements

escrowAggregateAdjustmentEstimate.description: The estimated amount of any adjustment made to the initial escrow account balance based on Regulation X requirements

escrowBalanceLenderTransferringToInvesto.description: The amount in the escrow account that is owed to the investor

escrowDisbursements.description: Payments made from the escrow account for expenses like taxes and insurance

escrowHoldbackInspectionCompletionDate.description: Date the inspection of the repairs was completed

escrowHoldbackInspectionRequired.description: Indicates whether an inspection of the repairs is required

escrowHoldbackRepairCompletionDate.description: Date the repair work was completed

escrowHoldbackRepairCompletionDueDate.description: Expected completion date for repair work

escrowHoldbackRepairsDescription.description: Description of repairs required for escrow holdback completion

escrowInitialBalance.description: The initial balance of the escrow account

escrowInitialBalanceEstimate.description: The estimated initial balance of the escrow account

escrowNumber.description: The unique identifier assigned to the escrow account

escrowPropertyInsuranceExFloodWaiverIndi.description: Indicates whether escrow for property insurance excluding flood are waived

escrowPropertyTaxesWaiverIndicator.description: Indicates whether escrow is waived for property taxes

escrowWaiverFeeAmount.description: The amount of the fee charged for opting out of an escrow account

escrowWaiverInterestRateIncreasePercent.description: The amount of the interest rate increase for opting out of an escrow account

excessInterestedPartyContributionsAmount.description: The amount of interested party contributions in excess of the amount permitted by underwriting guidelines for the loan's mortgage type

executedClosingPackageReceivedDate.description: Date the fully executed closing package was received by the lender after closing

expectedInvestorWireAmount.description: The expected amount wired by the investor to the lender for loan purchase

failureToPayNonEscrowedItemsConsequences.description: The consequences of failing to pay non-escrowed items

fannieMaeAssetRepresentationAndWarrantyR.description: Eligibility status for Fannie Mae asset representation and warranty relief
Expiration date for Fannie Mae asset representation and warranty relief eligibility
Total validated amount for Fannie Mae asset representation and warranty relief

fannieMaeDutyToServeIndicator.description: Indicates whether this loan is eligible for Duty to Serve by Fannie or Freddie. Populated based on the most recent AUS response.

fannieMaeEmploymentRepresentationAndWarr.description: The loan-level Fannie Mae employment representation and warranty relief eligibility from the latest DU/DO run.
The earliest Fannie Mae employment representation and warranty relief expiration date from the latest DU/DO run.

fannieMaeIncomeRepresentationAndWarranty.description: Eligibility status for Fannie Mae income representation and warranty relief
Expiration date for Fannie Mae income representation and warranty relief eligibility
The loan-level Fannie Mae income representation and warranty relief total validated amount from the latest DU/DO run.

fannieMaeMissionScore.description: The loan-level mission score as determined by the GSEs.

fannieMaeTractIncomeToAreaMedianIncomePe.description: The total income for borrowers on this loan as a percentage of the subject property's GSE tract-level area median income

feeQuoteIdentifier.description: The quote identifier corresponding to a fee request

feesPaidToInvestor.description: A list of fee types paid to the investor upon loan purchase

femaDisasterRiskLevel.description: The risk level of the worst FEMA disaster the loan is associated with

femaDisasters.description: The FEMA disasters associated with this loan

fhA92800AdditionalConditionsNeeded.description: Additional conditions needed for FHA loans as specified on HUD form 92800.5B

fhA92800AdditionalItemsNeeded.description: Additional items needed for FHA loans as specified on HUD form 92800.5B

fhaActionDate.description: Date the FHA takes action on the loan, such as approving or denying the application

fhaAppraisalLoggingQueryStatus.description: The status of the FHA appraisal logging query

fhaCaseAssignmentDate.description: The date the lender registers the loan through FHA connection. This date can impact the upfront and renewal MI rates for FHA Loans

fhaCaseCancelStatus.description: The status of the FHA case transfer action to a new lender.

fhaCaseQueryStatus.description: The status of the FHA pull case query action

fhaCaseTransferStatus.description: The status of the FHA case transfer action to a new lender.

fhaIdentityOfInterestIndicator.description: Indicates  preexisting connection between the property’s buyer and seller(s), such as a family or a business relationship.

fhaInsuranceApplicationStatus.description: The status of the FHA insurance application submission

fhaMonthlyInsurancePremiumAmount.description: The monthly FHA mortgage insurance premium amount

fhaMonthlyInsurancePremiumAmountEstimate.description: The estimated monthly FHA mortgage insurance premium amount

fhaMonthlyInsurancePremiumEscrowIndicato.description: Indicates whether the FHA monthly insurance premium is escrowed

fhaMonthlyInsurancePremiumTermMonthsCoun.description: The FHA Monthly Premium term, measured in months (e.g. a 10 year term would have 120 here)

fhaPropertyPriorSaleWithin36MonthsIndica.description: Indicates whether the property was last sold or transferred in the last 3 years.

fhaRefinanceType.description: The type of FHA refinance - simple, streamline, or rate and term

firstPaymentDueToInvestorDate.description: The date the first payment is due to the investor

firstPaymentTotalMonthlyAmount.description: Borrower initial monthly payment including principal, interest, and escrows

floodDeterminationCompanies.description: A list of the flood determination company file contacts on the loan

floodInsuranceEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the flood insurance is escrowed

floodInsuranceMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for flood insurance

The Freddie Mac asset representation and warranty relief total validated amount from the latest LPA run.

freddieMacEmploymentRepresentationAndWar.description: The loan-level Freddie Mac employment representation and warranty relief eligibility from the latest LPA run.
The earliest Freddie Mac employment representation and warranty relief expiration date from the latest LPA run.

freddieMacIncomeRepresentationAndWarrant.description: The loan-level Freddie Mac income representation and warranty relief eligibility from the latest LPA run.
The earliest Freddie Mac income representation and warranty relief expiration date from the latest LPA run.
The loan-level Freddie Mac income representation and warranty relief total validated amount from the latest LPA run.

fundedDate.description: The date the loan was actually disbursed or funded

fundingAdvanceAmount.description: The dollar amount disbursed by a warehouse lender or other source of capital to fund a loan

fundingAdvanceAmountMetadata.description: Metadata about the computation of the funding advance amount

fundingBeneficiaryAccountName.description: The name of the account for the settlement agent that will receive the lender wire transfer

fundingBeneficiaryAccountNumber.description: The account number of the settlement agent that will receive the lender wire transfer

fundingBeneficiaryName.description: The name of the settlement agent that will receive the lender wire transfer

fundingDestinationBankAddress.description: The address of the bank that will receive the lender wire transfer

fundingDestinationBankName.description: The name of the bank that will receive the lender wire transfer

fundingDestinationBankRoutingNumber.description: The routing number of the bank that will receive the lender wire transfer

fundingDisbursementAmountEstimate.description: Estimated net amount to be disbursed to the borrower after deducting fees, escrow, and prepaid interest from the loan amount

fundsOrderedDate.description: Date the funds were ordered to be disbursed.

governmentInsuranceObtained.description: Date the relevant government insurance certificate is received for the loan

governmentInsuranceStatus.description: The status of government insurance for the loan (Insured, Submitted but not yet insured, Not submitted)

governmentLoanSeasoningRequirementsMetIn.description: Indicates whether the government loan meets the payment history seasoning requirements, as defined by FHA, VA, or USDA

governmentMortgageCreditCertificateAmoun.description: Amount of money credited through mortgage credit certificate

governmentRefinanceBenefits.description: List of refinance benefits applicable to government loans.

grossCombinedLoanToValueRatio.description: The gross combined loan to value ratio (rounded to 2 decimal places) - the value of all liens on the subject property, including the subject mortgage and including any financed mortgage premium, divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

grossCombinedLoanToValueRatioUnrounded.description: The gross combined loan to value ratio (unrounded) - the value of all liens on the subject property, including the subject mortgage and including any financed mortgage premium, divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

grossHomeEquityCombinedLoanToValueRatio.description: Gross Home Equity CLTV ratio (rounded) - the value of all liens on the subject property assuming all lines fully drawn, including the subject mortgage and including any financed mortgage premium (MIP/FF/GF), divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

grossHomeEquityCombinedLoanToValueRatioU.description: Gross Home Equity CLTV ratio (unrounded) - the value of all liens on the subject property assuming all lines fully drawn, including the subject mortgage and including any financed mortgage premium (MIP/FF/GF), divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

grossLoanToValueRatio.description: The gross loan to value ratio (rounded to 2 decimal places) - the subject mortgage amount including any financed mortgage insurance premiums, divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

grossLoanToValueRatioUnrounded.description: The gross loan to value ratio (unrounded) - the subject mortgage amount including any financed mortgage insurance premiums, divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

grossUpRate.description: Gross up rate for the nontaxable portion of this income

grossUpRateMetadata.description: Metadata for the gross up rate computed field

gseRepresentationAndWarrantyReliefEarlie.description: The earliest expiration date across all representation and warranty relief categories for the selected AUS.

guarantyFeeAfterAlternatePaymentMethodPe.description: Contractual guaranty fee (after adjusting for the alternate payment method (APM) remittance cycle, if applicable) for an Mortgage Backed Security (MBS) pool mortgage.

guarantyFeePercent.description: The guaranty fee rate after applying all adjustments to the guaranty fee, such as buyup/buydown. The guaranty fee is a portion of the interest on the loan that is paid to a party to guarantee the timely payment of interest and principal to the holders of securities backed by the loan

hasObligationsToOtherParties.description: Has obligations to other parties in the transaction

hasRelativeProvidingServices.description: Relative of loan officer is providing additional services

helocImportantTermsInitialSentDate.description: Date the HELOC Important Terms was sent to the borrower

highCostDisclosureInitialSentDate.description: Date the first high cost disclosure was sent to the borrower

historicalAvailableAppraisalWaivers.description: Indicates which appraisal waiver programs, such as FNMA PIW or FMAC ACE, have ever been available on this loan (e.g. in any prior AUS run). This field is automatically populated based on AUS results

historicalTitleWaivers.description: Indicates which title waiver program has ever been available on this loan (e.g. in any prior AUS run). This field is automatically populated based on AUS results

hmdaApplicationSubmissionType.description: The method by which the application was submitted to the lender - directly or indirectly, for example through a broker

hmdaDispositionDate.description: The date of the HMDA action taken

hmdaDispositionType.description: Indicates the type of action taken on the application or HMDA covered loan. Used for HMDA reporting

hmdaPayableToInstitutionStatus.description: Indicates whether the HMDA covered loan was initially payable to the reporting institution

hmdaPurchaserType.description: The entity that purchased the loan

hoaDuesMonthlyPayment.description: Proposed monthly HOA dues payment for the subject property.

hoaSpecialAssessmentMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for HOA special assessments

homeCounselingDisclosureInitialSentDate.description: Date the first Home Counseling Disclosure was sent to the borrower

homeEquityCombinedLoanToValueRatio.description: Home Equity CLTV ratio (rounded to 2 decimal places) - the value of all liens on the subject property assuming all lines fully drawn, including the subject mortgage and including any financed mortgage premium, divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

homeEquityCombinedLoanToValueRatioUnroun.description: Home Equity CLTV ratio (unrounded) - the value of all liens on the subject property assuming all lines fully drawn, including the subject mortgage and including any financed mortgage premium, divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

homeInsuranceEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the home insurance is escrowed

homeInsuranceMonthlyPayment.description: Proposed monthly home insurance payment for the subject property.

homeLoanToolkitInitialSentDate.description: Date the first Home Loan Toolkit was sent to the borrower

homeManufacturers.description: A list of the home manufacturer file contacts on the loan

homeOwnersAssociations.description: A list of the homeowners association file contacts on the loan

homeOwnersInsuranceOrdered.description: The date the homeowners insurance was ordered

homeOwnersInsuranceReceived.description: The date the homeowners insurance was received

householdAnnualIncome.description: Total household income, including that of borrowers and non-borrower household members

householdSize.description: The total number of household members. For VA loans, this is determined based on borrower using entitlement's marital status and dependents.

housingExpensesToIncomeRatio.description: The housing expense to income ratio - monthly expenses for the subject property divided by monthly income

housingExpensesToIncomeRatioEstimate.description: Estimated housing expense to income ratio used when the actual ratio has not been calculated

hudCountyIncomeToAreaMedianIncomePercent.description: The total income for borrowers on this loan as a percentage of the subject property's HUD county-level area median income

hudStateIncomeToAreaMedianIncomePercenta.description: The total income for borrowers on this loan as a percentage of the subject property's HUD state-level area median income

hurricaneInsuranceEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the hurricane insurance is escrowed

hurricaneInsuranceMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for hurricane insurance

ilapldScenarioChangeTriggerDate.description: The date that the latest scenario change was triggered for ILAPLD

ilapldStatus.description: A status of whether or not Illinois Anti-Predatory Lending Database has been updated with this loan.

ilapldStatusDateTime.description: The date and time associated with the ILAPLD status

ilapldSubmissionDate.description: The date and time of the latest ILAPLD submission

ilapldSubmissionDueDate.description: Indicates the date that ILAPLD submission is due based on when TRID was triggered or loan was updated.

ilapldSubmissionId.description: The ID of the latest successful ILAPLD submission

ilapldSubmissionResponseCodes.description: Response codes received from the latest ILAPLD submission

improvementCostsAmount.description: Amount of the loan proceeds being put towards home improvement costs.

improvementCostsEscrowAmount.description: Amount withheld in escrow until project milestones or conditions are met. Used for construction, renovation or energy improvement projects.

improvementCostsEscrowType.description: The purpose of holding back escrow funds used for construction, renovation or energy improvement projects. These funds are meant to cover associated expenses and disbursed throughout the project’s duration.

improvementsAlreadyCompletedIndicator.description: Indicates that the home improvements being paid for with the loan proceeds have already been completed

inferredFannieMaeInvestorFeatureCodes.description: Fannie Mae specified identifiers used to identify loan features that have been inferred from attributes of this loan

inferredFreddieMacInvestorFeatureCodes.description: Freddie Mac specified identifiers used to identify loan features that have been inferred from attributes of this loan

initialLoanEstimateReceivedDate.description: The earliest date that any loan estimate was received by at least one borrower on this loan. Incorporates the mailbox rule and presumed receipt

initialMortgagePrincipalAndInterestMonth.description: The first month principal and interest payment for the subject loan. This uses the note rate without considering any temporary buydown, and assumes interest-only draw period for HELOCs.
The actual first month principal and interest payment for the subject loan using the note rate after initial buydown reduction.

initialTexas12DayNoticeReceivedDate.description: The date on which the initial "Notice Concerning Extensions of Credit" was received, initiating the mandatory 12-day waiting period before closing, as required by Texas law.

initialTexas12DayNoticeSentDate.description: The date on which the initial "Notice Concerning Extensions of Credit" was sent

intentToProceedDate.description: Date the borrower provided intent to proceed with the loan

interestPaidAtFunding.description: The amount of interest owed to either the lender or the investor after the loan has been purchased. See the Interest payment direction field for the party that interest is paid to.

interestPaidAtFundingMetadata.description: Metadata for the computed interest paid at funding field

interestPaidAtFundingRecipient.description: The party that interest is paid to when the loan has been purchased

investorCollateralDueDate.description: Date the investor expects to receive the package. Past this date, the investor's commitment to buy the loan is no longer valid.

investorCommitmentExpirationDate.description: The date when the investor's purchase commitment for this loan expires

investorCommitmentIdentifier.description: Unique identifier of the commitment that states the terms under which a loan seller and Fannie Mae agree to exchange loans for cash. Used in Fannie Mae ULDD exports only.

investorCommitmentNumber.description: Unique identifier assigned to the investor commitment for a mandatory loan delivery. Used in pricing and lock management workflows. Not included in ULDD exports.

investorCommitmentPrice.description: The price associated with the investor commitment, expressed in points, for a mandatory loan delivery

investorContractIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the pool or contract that the loan is being delivered against, typically for MBS loans. Used in both Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac ULDD exports. Managed exclusively through pool management (set when a loan is added to a pool, cleared when removed).

investorCustodianIdentifier.description: The unique identifier assigned to the document custodian for the investor purchase advice.

investorCustodianName.description: The name of the document custodian for the investor purchase advice.

investorDeliveryCarrier.description: The shipping carrier used for delivering recorded loan documents to the investor

investorDeliveryRecordedOriginalsReceive.description: The date when recorded original documents were received by the investor.

investorDeliveryRecordedOriginalsShipped.description: The date when recorded original documents were shipped to the investor.

investorDeliveryTrackingNumber.description: The tracking number provided by the carrier for shipment of recorded loan documents to the investor.

investorInterestPerDiemDays.description: Number of days in a year used to calculate the amount of interest owed to lender or investor after the loan has been purchased

investorLoanNumber.description: The loan number as assigned by the investor

investorPurchasePremium.description: The premium paid upon loan purchase, calculated as the investor purchase price minus the unpaid balance at the time of sale.

investorPurchasePrice.description: The total amount funded upon loan purchase, including both the loan amount and the purchase premium

investorRemittanceDay.description: The day of the month on which principal and interest for the loan are remitted by the servicer to the investor.

investorShipmentDate.description: Date the collateral was sent to the investor.

investorWireAmount.description: The amount wired by the investor to the lender for loan purchase

investorWireDate.description: The date the investor wired the payment for the loan

irsTaxFormThirdParties.description: The third-party(ies) facilitating the request and receipt of the IRS tax forms for the loan.

isRestricted.description: This loan is restricted and can only be viewed and updated by users with appropriate restricted loan permissions

landContractExecutionDate.description: If this loan is to pay off a land contract, the date said contract was originally executed. This determines whether the mortgage is classified as a purchase or refinance mortgage

latestCreditConsentDateAcrossAllBorrower.description: Latest hard credit consent date across all borrowers

latestDODUMessageCodes.description: Message codes returned in the latest DO/DU run

latestDODUResult.description: Latest result of a DO/DU run

latestLenderCreditRequest.description: The most recent lender credit request on this loan, by RequestedAt. Null if there are no requests.

latestLoanDecision.description: Most recent decisioned status, as determined by an underwriter, on this loan

latestLoanDecisionApprovalExpirationDate.description: Date the approval will expire if the latest underwriter decision status is 'Approved'.

latestLoanDecisionByUserId.description: The user ID of the underwriter who made the most recent loan decision

latestLoanDecisionCustomDenyReasons.description: The custom deny reason(s) selected if the most recent loan decision is Deny

latestLoanDecisionDate.description: Date on which the underwriter made the most recent loan decision captured in the 'Latest loan decision' field

latestLoanDecisionDenyReasons.description: The deny reason(s) selected if the most recent loan decision is Deny

latestLoanDecisionOtherDenyReason.description: The free-text other deny reason if the most recent loan decision is Deny

latestLoanEstimateDeliveryExpirationDate.description: Date on which latest loan estimate expires

latestLoanEstimateDeliverySentDate.description: Date on which latest loan estimates were delivered

latestLPAMessageCodes.description: Message codes returned in the latest LPA run

latestLPAResult.description: Latest result of a LPA run

latestTexas12DayNoticeReceivedDate.description: The date on which the latest "Notice Concerning Extensions of Credit" was received, initiating the mandatory 12-day waiting period before closing, as required by Texas law.

leadSourceId.description: Lead Source ID of the Loan

lenderAttorneys.description: A list of the lender attorney file contacts on the loan

lenderCreditRequests.description: Requests for lender credit on this loan, ordered chronologically. Most recent entry determines current state.

lenderDocumentCustodians.description: A list of the lender document custodian file contacts on the loan

lenderLoanNumber.description: The loan number as assigned by the lender. Should match the Vesta loan number.

lenderPaidMIInterestRateAdjustment.description: The percentage of the mortgage interest rate allocated to fund lender purchased mortgage insurance premiums

lesseeName.description: The name of the lessee of the investment property.

lesserSubordinationAgreementMaximumLoanA.description: The lesser of the maximum loan amounts per subordination agreement(s) by subordinating lenders

lessorName.description: The name of the lessor of the investment property.

loanAmount.description: Loan amount, not including any financed mortgage insurance premium, VA funding fee, or USDA guarantee fee

loanAmountIncludingFinancedMIPorFF.description: Loan amount, including any financed mortgage insurance premium, VA funding fee, or USDA guarantee fee

loanAmountInitiallyAppliedFor.description: The amount of the loan initially requested by the borrower. This amount may include financed PMI, MIP and Funding Fees

loanApplicationDate.description: For wholesale and correspondent channels, this refers to the date the application was submitted by the third-party originator. This date is not exported, but can be used to configure ECOA and TRID-triggered dates.

loanChannel.description: The lender's role in the mortgage process, defining how the loan is originated, funded, and potentially sold.

loanDefaultLossPartyType.description: Indicates the party that bears the default loss for the loan.

loanEstimateNeedsToBeSentDate.description: Date by which loan estimate needs to be sent - the TRID triggered date plus three business days.

loanLastSyncedWithServicerDate.description: The date and time when the loan was last synchronized with the loan servicer

loanLevelBuyupBuydownPercent.description: The percentage adjustment applied to the loan's pass-through rate in Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac MBS trading, representing a buyup or buydown of the guaranty fee to increase or decrease the yield relative to the contractually applicable rate.

loanLevelBuyupBuydownType.description: Indicates whether the loan's guaranty fee has been adjusted through a buyup or buydown in MBS trading

loanMaturityDate.description: The date when the loan is scheduled to be paid in full as reflected on the Note

loanMaturityDateMetadata.description: Metadata for the final payment date computed field, including override status and value provenance.

loanOriginator.description: The loan originator / primary assignee of the loan

loanOriginatorSignedApplicationDate.description: Date the loan originator signed the application

loanPayments.description: The principal, interest, and escrow payments that have been made on the loan

loanPurpose.description: Whether this mortgage loan is a purchase or refinance

loanServicingStatus.description: The status of the loan in the servicing system

loanStatuses.description: A field with a bunch of status flags that can apply to the loan. Will likely be deprecated for a more opinionated model re: status

loanSummaryAppraisalStatus.description: The current status of the appraisal for the loan

loanSummaryDisclosuresStatus.description: The current status of regulatory disclosures for the loan

loanSummaryUnderwritingStatus.description: The current status of underwriting for the loan

loanToValueRatio.description: The base loan to value ratio (rounded to 2 decimal places) - the subject mortgage amount not including any financed mortgage insurance premiums, divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

loanToValueRatioDeterminingPMI.description: The loan to value ratio (rounded to 2 decimal places) used to determine if the loan requires private mortgage insurance. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used as the fallback. This field properly incorporates the NY state rules around determination of whether private mortgage insurance is necessary. This field is null for loans that are not conventional.

loanToValueRatioUnrounded.description: The base loan to value ratio (unrounded) - the subject mortgage amount not including any financed mortgage insurance premiums, divided by the value of the subject property. If the actual property value is not populated, the estimated property value is used to compute this field

loanType.description: Whether this loan is a mortgage, HELOC, or home equity loan

loanUploadedToServicerDate.description: The date that the loan was uploaded to the servicing system

loanUploadedToServicerIndicator.description: Loan has been uploaded to a servicing system

lockAndShopIndicator.description: Indicates that the borrower locked in their interest rate while shopping for a subject property

loLicenseUnexpiredAndContainsSubjectStat.description: Indicates whether the loan originator on the loan has a license for the subject property state and is currently unexpired.

lowestMedianCreditScore.description: Loan level credit score. This is typically the lowest median credit score of the borrowers on the loan, but for some programs, might be calculated differently based on Alternative credit score calculation method

maxStreamlineIrrrlBaseLoanAmount.description: Maximum allowable base loan amount for FHA Streamline, VA IRRRL, or USDA Streamlined Assist refinance

maxStreamlineIrrrlLoanAmount.description: Maximum allowable total loan amount for FHA Streamline, VA IRRRL, or USDA Streamlined Assist refinance

mersMinNumber.description: The Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems unique mortgage identification number (MIN)

mersMinNumberMetadata.description: Metadata about how the MERS MIN number was computed or overridden

mersOriginatedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the loan was originated with MERS as the original mortgagee of record (MOM)

mersRegisteredDate.description: Date the mortgage was registered with MERS.

mersTransferCompletedDate.description: Date the mortgage was transferred via MERS.

miPremiumSchedule.description: If the mortgage insurance premiums are paid over time (for the duration of the insurance), how much it costs the borrower per month

monthlyMaintenanceCost.description: Monthly property maintenance expense calculated from property square footage.

monthlyMaintenanceCostEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the monthly maintenance cost is escrowed

monthsOfReservesAvailable.description: The number of months a borrower can cover housing expenses using their reserves

mortgageInsuranceCancellationLTVCutoff.description: The LTV at which the mortgage insurance can be cancelled

mortgageInsuranceCancellationType.description: The method by which the mortgage insurance calculation threshold is determined

mortgageInsuranceCompanies.description: The mortgage insurance company(ies) for the loan.

mortgageInsuranceCoveragePercentage.description: The percentage of the loan amount that the mortgage insurance covers

mortgageInsuranceFinancedAmount.description: The amount of the upfront mortgage insurance premium being financed into the mortgage

mortgageInsuranceFinancedIndicator.description: Indicates that the upfront mortgage insurance premium is being financed/rolled into the loan amount

mortgageInsuranceInitialMonthlyRate.description: The initial monthly rate for mortgage insurance

mortgageInsuranceLenderSpecialProgramDes.description: A lender-specified code indicating pre-approved exceptions or special terms for mortgage insurance

mortgageInsuranceMonthlyPayment.description: Proposed monthly mortgage insurance payment for the subject loan.

mortgageInsurancePremiumAtClosing.description: Indicates that the initial upfront mortgage insurance premium will be paid at closing

mortgageInsurancePremiumPaidBy.description: Who the mortgage insurance premiums are paid by

mortgageInsurancePremiumPlan.description: How the mortgage insurance premiums are paid - upfront vs over time

mortgageInsurancePrepaidPremiumAmount.description: The amount of the MI premium prepaid at closing

mortgageInsuranceQuoteExpirationDate.description: The date which the selected mortgage insurance quote will expire

mortgageInsuranceQuoteIdentifier.description: Identifier of the rate quote request

mortgageInsuranceRenewalType.description: The method by which new PMI premium is calculated

mortgageInsuranceScheduledCancellationDa.description: The date of the last monthly payment that includes a monthly mortgage insurance payment

mortgageInsuranceStatus.description: The status of mortgage insurance for this loan

mortgageInsuranceUpfrontPayment.description: The upfront mortgage insurance premium paid at closing

mortgageInsuranceUpfrontPremiumAmount.description: The total amount of the upfront mortgage insurance premium due at closing

mortgageInsuranceUpfrontPremiumPercent.description: The percentage of the loan amount that is paid upfront for mortgage insurance premium

mortgagePrincipalAndInterestMonthlyPayme.description: The projected principal and interest payment of the subject loan, used for qualifying ratios. This is the monthly payment for fixed mortgages, and uses the qualifying rate for ARMs and floating rate HELOCs.

mriMetIndicator.description: Indicates whether the loan meets the FHA minimum required investment requirements.

mudTaxEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the MUD taxes are escrowed

mudTaxMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for MUD taxes

needsChangeInCircumstancesReview.description: An indicator that a change in circumstances review is needed

needsReprice.description: An indicator that the loan needs to be repriced

negativePrepaidInterestIndicator.description: Indicates whether the first payment date should be pulled forward by a month and allow negative prepaid interest. This field is set by the first payment date cutoff set in other versioned settings, and can be overridden by the user on a per loan basis.

negativePrepaidInterestIndicatorMetadata.description: Metadata for the negative prepaid interest indicator computed field, including override status and value provenance.

netSellPrice.description: The net proceeds received from selling the loan, after accounting for any costs or adjustments

newCDNeededFor3DayReview.description: Indicates whether a new Closing Disclosure must be issued due to changes in loan terms that exceed TRID tolerance thresholds, requiring a new 3-day waiting period

nextPaymentPaidTo.description: Indicates where the borrower’s first/next scheduled payment after sale or transfer should be sent. Used for transfer letters and servicing boarding

nonAllocatedLenderCredit.description: The amount of lender credit not allocated towards closing costs

nonBorrowingOwnerCount.description: The number of non-borrowing owners on the loan

nonQualifiedMortgageIndicator.description: Indicates whether the loan is a non-qualified mortgage (i.e. whether the loan doesn't meet the CFPB's qualified mortgage definition)

notaryAgents.description: A list of the notary agent file contacts on the loan

notarySigningMethod.description: The signing method for the non collateral closing documents

noticeOfIncompletenessExpirationDate.description: Date on which the Notice of Incompleteness expires and the loan will be closed as incomplete

noticeOfIncompletenessInitialSentDate.description: Date the Notice of Incompleteness was sent to the borrower

orderedPmiQuoteType.description: The type of PMI quote that was provided - delegated or non-delegated

orderTitleScenarioStatus.description: Tracks the scenario status for title ordering, indicating whether changes have occurred that may require reordering title.

originalCloseOfEscrowDate.description: The initial close of escrow date as reflected in the original purchase agreement. Editable by users. This value is preserved when amendments are made but may be manually updated.

otherHousingExpenses.description: Additional monthly housing expenses that do not fit into other specific expense categories

otherPartyOwnsBeneficialInterestInLender.description: Indicates whether any party involved in the transaction has an ownership stake in the lending institution

otherProposedHousingExpenses.description: Other proposed monthly housing expenses (not mortgage, subordinate mortgage, property, home insurance, mortgage insurance monthly payments) for the subject property

otherRefinanceBenefit.description: Description of the other benefits associated with the loan. Used for net tangible benefit tests.

ownedProperties.description: Properties owned by the borrower on the loan

partiesThatOwnBeneficialInterestInLender.description: List of identifiers for parties involved in the transaction who have an ownership stake in the lending institution

partnerBrokers.description: A list of the mortgage broker file contacts on the loan. Relevant when loan channel is Wholesale.

piggybackChildLoanId.description: The GUID of the piggyback child loan associated with this loan

piggybackLoanNumber.description: The loan number of the related piggyback loan, referencing the child if the subject is a parent loan, or the parent if the subject is a child loan

piggybackParentLoanId.description: The GUID of the piggyback parent loan associated with this loan

pmiOrderCompletedAt.description: Timestamp the PMI order was completed

pointOfSaleIdentifier.description: Unique identifier used to reference this loan in a point of sale system

potentialPairOffFee.description: The estimated pair-off fee that may be charged by the investor if the loan is not delivered under a forward commitment

preApprovalExpirationDate.description: The date on which the preapproval expires

preApprovalRequestedDate.description: The date a preapproval request was made

preApprovalRequestedIndicator.description: Indicates whether a preapproval was requested for the loan

previousMortgageAgencyCaseNumber.description: The case number for the borrower's current first lien government loan

previousMortgageAmortizationType.description: The amortization type on the borrower's current first lien mortgage

previousMortgageCurrentPayment.description: The current payment on the borrower's current first lien mortgage loan

previousMortgageCurrentRate.description: The current rate on the borrower's current first lien mortgage loan

previousMortgageDebtToIncome.description: The DTI that was used to originate the borrower's current first lien mortgage

previousMortgageFirstPaymentDate.description: The first payment date of the current first lien mortgage

previousMortgageFromSameLenderIndicator.description: Indicates whether the current first lien mortgage was from the same lender

previousMortgageInterestOnlyIndicator.description: Indicates whether the borrower's current first lien mortgage allowed interest-only payments to be made

previousMortgageLenderLoanNumber.description: The loan number assigned by the lender of the previous mortgage being refinanced

previousMortgageLenderLoanNumberMetadata.description: Metadata for the previous mortgage lender loan number computed field, including override status and value provenance.

previousMortgageLoanTerm.description: The term of the current first lien mortgage in months

previousMortgageNoteAmount.description: The note amount of the current first lien mortgage

previousMortgageNoteDate.description: The note date on the current first lien mortgage

previousMortgageNoteRate.description: The interest rate as it appears on the note of the current first lien mortgage

previousMortgagePurposeType.description: Whether the current first lien mortgage was for the purpose of a purchase or a refinance

previousMortgageRefinanceCashOutDetermin.description: Whether the previous mortgage was cash out, or no or limited cash out

previousMortgageType.description: The mortgage type - conventional, FHA, etc - of the current first lien mortgage

primaryBorrowerEmailAddress.description: The email address of the primary borrower (the borrower who appears first on the loan application)

primaryBorrowerFullName.description: The full name of the primary borrower (the borrower who appears first on the loan application)

primaryBorrowerPhoneNumbers.description: The phone numbers of the primary borrower (the borrower who appears first on the loan application)

primaryContacts.description: A list of the file contacts on the loan that have been indicated as primary for that contact type

primaryMortgageBeingRefinanced.description: The primary mortgage that is subject to the refinancing process

privateMortgageInsuranceProvider.description: The company that is providing the insurance. Applicable if mortgage insurance is private.

proceedsUsedForEnergyPurposesIndicator.description: Indicates whether any of the proceeds will be used for energy improvements on the house, including to pay off other debts previously incurred for energy improvements on the house

processVersionLastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp when the loan's process version was last updated

propertySellerName.description: Name of the entity (person or business) selling the property

propertySellers.description: A list of the property seller file contacts on the loan

propertySellerType.description: Type of the entity selling the property - either individual or business

propertyTaxEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the county property taxes are escrowed

propertyTaxMonthlyPayment.description: Proposed monthly property tax payment for the subject property.

purchaseAdvicePrice.description: The price specified in the purchase advice, expressed in points, used to determine the total amount funded for the loan

purchaseContingencyDate.description: Last day that the buyer can back out of a purchase due to inability to obtain financing, as specified in the purchase contract. Also called financing contingency date or loan contingency date.

purchaseContractDate.description: Date the purchase contract was signed

purchasedByInvestorDate.description: The date the loan was purchased by the investor

receivedAtWarehouseDate.description: Date the collateral was received by the warehouse lender.

recordedMortgageReceivedDate.description: The date on which the recorded mortgage was received

recordingOffices.description: The recording office(s) for the loan.

referredBy.description: The individual or entity that referred the loan to the lender or loan officer

refinanceBenefits.description: Benefits associated with the loan as automatically determined by the system based on previous mortgage details. Used for net tangible benefit tests.

refinanceCashOutBenefits.description: Benefits associated with the loan specifically related to the cash being received. Used for net tangible benefit tests.

refinanceCashOutBenefitsOtherDescription.description: Description of other benefits associated with the loan specifically related to the cash being received. Used for net tangible benefit tests.

refinanceCashOutDelayedFinancingIndicato.description: Indicates a refinance transaction in which the borrower receives cash out prior to meeting the standard seasoning requirement for the loan product

refinanceCashOutDeterminationType.description: Determines whether the refinance will result in no or limited cash out, or a significant cash out. Used for loan categorization and underwriting guidelines

refinanceHousingExpenseMonthlySavings.description: Calculated as previous housing expense minus new housing expense.

refinancePACELoanPayoffAmount.description: The amount of the loan proceeds being spent on paying off PACE loans

refinancePrimaryUseOfProceeds.description: The primary way in which the proceeds of the refinance will be used

refinancePrimaryUseOfProceedsOtherDescri.description: Further describes the use of proceeds, if it is not one of the predefined types

refinanceReductionInRate.description: The reduction in rate associated with the refinance, calculated as the current rate minus the new rate. This field is null if the new rate is higher than or equal to the current rate.

relativeProvidedServices.description: Services provided by relatives of the loan officer involved in the transaction

renovationCompletedDate.description: The date the renovation/rehabilitation should be completed.

renovationConsultants.description: The renovation consultants providing guidance and oversight for the renovation project.

renovationContingencyAmount.description: Dollar amount that has been designated as a reserve based on the renovation cost to cover possible overages in repair costs.

renovationContingencyPercent.description: Percentage of the renovation costs that has been designated as a reserve to cover possible overages in repair costs.

renovationFinancedAmount.description: Total amount of renovation funds included in the loan.

renovationLoanIndicator.description: Indicates whether the loan is for a renovation.

reoMarketingPartyType.description: Identifies the party responsible for marketing the property in case of default.

repricingScenarioStatus.description: Tracks the scenario status for loan repricing, indicating whether changes have occurred that may require repricing the loan.

requiredCashToClose.description: The total amount of funds needed to close the mortgage transaction

requiredCashToCloseEstimate.description: Estimated total amount of funds needed to close the mortgage transaction

requiredCashToClosePlusUnsourcedEarnestM.description: The cash to close requirement. If this is a conventional mortgage or an FHA mortgage where earnest money > 1% of the purchase price, this value is adjusted to require assets covering any unsourced earnest money deposit.
An estimate of the cash to close requirement, adjusted for any unsourced earnest money deposit.

requiredPropertyDataReports.description: Indicates which investors require a property data report even if an appraisal waiver is present

requiredReserves.description: The required minimum reserves to close this loan

requiredReservesMetadata.description: Metadata for the required reserves computed field

rescindedDate.description: The date on which the borrower executed their right to rescind the loan.

rescissionDate.description: Date on which the borrower's right to cancel the loan expires. This is calculated as three business days from the closing date.

rescissionDateMetadata.description: Metadata about how the rescission date value was computed or overridden.

reservesAmount.description: The borrower funds that remain available after the mortgage closes

reservesAmountEstimate.description: The borrower funds that remain available after the mortgage closes

residualIncome.description: The dollar amount of the monthly balance of funds available for family support after meeting the borrower's shelter expenses, debts, and taxes as defined by the VA

runAusScenarioStatus.description: Tracks the change status of the AUS (Automated Underwriting System) scenario, indicating whether loan data changes require an AUS rerun.

runDUDOWithoutCreditDetailsIndicator.description: Indicates whether DU/DO was run without using broker-provided credit credentials. Only set when a wholesale loan requires an underwriting-only AUS run.

runOrderPmiScenarioStatus.description: Tracks the scenario status for ordering PMI, indicating whether changes have occurred that may require reordering PMI.

runPmiScenarioStatus.description: Tracks the scenario status for quoting PMI, indicating whether changes have occurred that may require re-quoting PMI.
