saleAndLeasebackIndicator.description: Indicates whether an investment property transaction is in a sale and leaseback agreement.

salesContractPurchasePrice.description: Purchase price for the subject property if the loan is a purchase mortgage

sarIssuedNotificationOfValueDate.description: Date when the Staff Appraisal Reviewer (SAR) issued the Notice of Value (NOV) for the property. Relevant to VA loans.

scheduledFirstPaymentDate.description: The date of the first scheduled mortgage payment to be made by the borrower under the terms of the mortgage

scheduledFirstPaymentDateMetadata.description: Metadata for the scheduled first payment date computed field

schoolTaxAssessors.description: The school tax assessor(s) for the loan.

schoolTaxEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the school taxes are escrowed

schoolTaxMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for school taxes

securityInstrumentRiders.description: The required riders for loan features features like ARMs, balloon payments, VA loans, condo property types, PUDs, second home financing, 1-4 family property types, or bi-weekly payments. Determined by the system based on amortization type, mortgage type, subject property type, and subject property intended usage

securityInstrumentRidersOtherDescription.description: A description of any additional instrument riders.

selectedAutomatedUnderwritingSystem.description: The automated underwriting system selected for evaluating the loan

selectedCreditScoreModel.description: The credit score model selected for this loan (e.g., Classic FICO or VantageScore 4.0). Determines which scoring model's scores are used for underwriting and pricing when borrowers have scores from multiple models.

sellerAttorneys.description: A list of the seller attorney file contacts on the loan

sellerClosingAdjustments.description: A list of all of the seller party adjustments on the loan, this does not include seller closing adjustments to or from the borrower

sellerRealEstateAgents.description: A list of the seller real estate agent file contacts on the loan

sellerSignatoryName.description: If the seller is a business, the name of the person who signed the purchase contract on behalf of the seller

serviceProviderOwnedByRelatives.description: Relative of loan officer owns providing additional services

servicerLoanId.description: A unique identifier assigned by the servicer to identify the loan

servicesOwnedByRelatives.description: List of service providers owned by relatives of the loan officer and their obligations

servicingRightsBuyerDesignatedSubservice.description: The sub-servicer(s) designated by the servicing rights buyer for the loan

servicingRightsBuyers.description: A list of entities purchasing the mortgage servicing rights on the loan

servicingRightsSaleDate.description: The date on which the mortgage servicing rights (MSRs) are sold by the lender

servicingRightsSoldSeparatelyIndicator.description: Indicates whether the servicing rights are sold to a buyer other than the loan investor

servicingTransferEffectiveDate.description: The effective date on which operational servicing responsibility transfers to the new servicer or subservicer after the mortgage servicing rights (MSRs) are sold

servicingTransferStatus.description: Defines whether the servicing on the loan will be retained or transferred to another party

shippedToWarehouseDate.description: Date the collateral was sent to the warehouse lender.

splitMIUpfrontPremiumPercent.description: The upfront mortgage insurance premium percent, applies only to split premium mortgage insurance

stakeholdersAffiliatedWithBuilderOrSelle.description: Indicates preexisting connection between the property's stakeholders and builder or seller(s), such as a family or a business relationship.

stateTaxAssessors.description: The state tax assessor(s) for the loan.

stateTaxEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the state taxes are escrowed

stateTaxMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for state taxes

subjectProperty.description: The property that is the subject of the loan

subjectPropertyDSCR.description: The monthly gross income associated with an investment property divided by monthly housing expenses

subjectPropertyDSCREstimate.description: Estimated debt service coverage ratio for the subject property

subjectPropertyFoundIndicator.description: In the case of a purchase, whether the borrower has found a subject property

submittedToUnderwritingDate.description: For wholesale and correspondent channels, the date the application was submitted to underwriting by the third-party originator. Can be used to configure ECOA and TRID-triggered dates.

submitUCDScenarioStatus.description: Tracks the scenario status for UCD submission, indicating whether changes have occurred that may require resubmitting the UCD.

subordinateHelocDrawnAmount.description: The outstanding HELOC drawn amount for the subject property, derived from either liability or concurrent financing. Only applicable to first liens

subordinateHelocLineAmount.description: The outstanding HELOC line amount for the subject property, derived from either liability or concurrent financing. Only applicable to first liens

subordinateLiensMonthlyPrincipalAndInter.description: Proposed monthly P&I for all subordinate liens on the subject property, including the subject loan (if subordinate lien), concurrent financing, and retained existing subordinate liens.

subordinateMortgagePrincipalAndInterestM.description: Total monthly payment for all subordinate liens excluding the subject loan

subprimeIndicator.description: Indicates whether the loan is classified as subprime, typically for borrowers with higher risk profiles.

subservicers.description: A list of the subservicer file contacts on the loan

supplementalPropertyInsuranceEscrowedInd.description: Indicates whether the supplemental property insurance is escrowed

supplementalPropertyInsuranceMonthlyPaym.description: The monthly payment for supplemental property insurance

supplementalTaxEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the supplemental tax is escrowed

supplementalTaxMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for supplemental taxes

surveyors.description: A list of the surveyor file contacts on the loan

testLoanIndicator.description: Exclude loan from reporting and routing/assignment logic?

thirdPartyOriginatorLoanNumber.description: The loan number as assigned in the third-party originator platform. Used for brokered loans

titleAgents.description: A list of the title agent file contacts on the loan

titleClosingPackageCarrier.description: The name of the shipping carrier used to send the executed closing package from the title company to the lender

titleClosingPackageShippedDate.description: The date the executed closing package was shipped from the title company to the lender

titleClosingPackageTrackingNumber.description: The tracking number assigned by the carrier for the executed closing package shipped from the title company to the lender

titleCompanyDeclinedTitleWaiver.description: Indicates whether the title company declined the title waiver

titleWaivers.description: Indicates which title waiver program this loan is eligible for. This field is automatically populated based on AUS results

totalAdjustmentsAndOtherCredits.description: Computed field that totals adjustments and other credits for LE/CD

totalApplicableLiabilityPayments.description: Sum of all liability payments, not including those paid at or before closing or excluded from DTI

totalAssetsValue.description: The sum of all usable asset values on the loan, using the qualified amount when available, otherwise the GSE-validated amount (Fannie Mae for DU/DO, Freddie Mac for LPA), otherwise the stated asset value.

totalBaseline.description: The total of all costs that were disclosed for this loan that are considered a valid baseline

totalBorrowerClosingCostsPaidBeforeClosi.description: The sum of all closing costs that the borrower has paid prior to the closing date

totalBorrowerPaidClosingCosts.description: The sum of all closing costs, including prepaids and initial escrow payments, paid by the borrower

totalBorrowerPaidClosingCostsEstimate.description: An estimate of the total closing costs that the borrower is expected to pay

totalBorrowerPaidClosingCostsWithoutLend.description: The total amount of closing costs paid by the borrower, excluding any credits provided by the lender
An estimate of the total closing costs paid by the borrower, excluding any credits provided by the lender

totalBorrowerPaidFeesEstimate.description: An estimate of the total fees that the borrower will pay

totalClosingCosts.description: Computed field that totals all of the closing costs paid by all parties minus points

totalClosingCostsAmount.description: Total of all of the closing costs, including prepaids and initial escrow payments, paid by all parties

totalClosingCostsAmountEstimate.description: An estimated total of all closing costs, including prepaids and initial escrow payments, to be paid by all parties

totalClosingCostsEstimate.description: An estimated sum of all closing costs, including prepaids and initial escrow payments, to be paid by all parties

totalDebtBeingPaidOff.description: Total debt being paid off at closing

totalFees.description: Total paid fees that will be paid on this loan, regardless of the payor

totalFeesEstimate.description: Estimated total fees that will be paid on this loan, regardless of the payor

totalFeesPaidToInvestor.description: The total amount of all fees paid to the investor upon loan purchase

totalFinanceCharge.description: Total cost of credit to the borrower, including interest and certain fees

totalHousingExpenses.description: Total proposed monthly housing expenses for all borrower-occupied residences after closing. Includes subject property expenses (if borrower-occupied), retained owned property expenses, and rent for borrowers not in owned properties.

totalHousingExpensesEstimate.description: Estimated total proposed monthly housing expenses after the subject loan closes

totalInterestedPartyContributionsPercent.description: Total interested party contributions as a percentage of the purchase price

totalLenderCredits.description: The total of lender credited points, tolerance cures, etc. These are the non-itemized credits, so this does not include lender paid closing costs

totalLenderCreditsChangeInCircumstance.description: Indicates if total lender credits have changed due to changed circumstances since initial Loan Estimate

totalLenderCreditsChangeInCircumstanceDa.description: Date when total lender credits were modified due to changed circumstances

totalLenderCreditsChangeInCircumstanceRe.description: Reason for total lender credit amount change

totalLenderCreditsWithoutToleranceCures.description: The total of lender credited points and other non-itemized credits, excluding tolerance cures

totalLenderCreditsWithoutToleranceCuresL.description: The baseline amount of total lender credits (excluding tolerance cures) from the last valid disclosure, used to determine tolerance cure amounts

totalMonthlyIncome.description: The sum of all income on the loan, calculated per top-level income record using the qualified amount when available. Otherwise the stated amount is used.

totalMonthlyLiabilities.description: Non-primary or subject housing expense liabilities used for the DTI calculation

totalMonthlyObligation.description: Numerator of the DTI ratio, the total monthly obligations of all borrowers on the loan including housing expenses and other liabilities

totalNetIncome.description: Total net income of all borrowers on the loan

totalNonItemizedSellerCredit.description: The total amount of non-itemized credit provided by the seller. This does not include itemized seller paid closing costs

totalQualifiedAssetsValue.description: The sum of all usable asset values, using qualified amounts only

totalQualifiedMonthlyIncome.description: The sum of all qualified income on the loan

totalRealEstateAgentCredits.description: The total amount of non-itemized credit provided by Real estate agents

totalSellerVAEntitlementLevel.description: The total VA entitlement level across all sellers on the loan

totalTenPercentToleranceCures.description: The total amount of cures paid by the lender for a certain bucket of closing costs, when the total cost of fees in that bucket exceeds the estimated cost by more than 10%. This is a regulatory requirement under the TILA-RESPA Integrated Disclosure rule

totalTenPercentToleranceCuresEstimate.description: An estimate of the total amount of 10% tolerance cures

totalToleranceCures.description: The total amount of lender credits given to cure tolerance violations. These are credits given to the borrower when the actual closing costs exceed the estimated costs beyond the tolerance limit

totalToleranceCuresEstimate.description: The estimated total of lender credits provided as tolerance cures. This is an estimate and may change as the loan progresses

totalToleranceCuresMetadata.description: Metadata for the total tolerance cures computed field

totalVARemainingEntitlementLevel.description: The total remaining amount of VA entitlement available across all borrowers to use towards a new VA loan

totalZeroPercentToleranceCures.description: The total amount of tolerance cures for the 0% tolerance bucket. This includes cures for fees where the actual cost exceeds the estimated cost and the lender must absorb the entire difference. Computed as TotalToleranceCures minus TotalTenPercentToleranceCures

totalZeroPercentToleranceCuresEstimate.description: An estimate of the total amount of 0% tolerance cures

townPropertyTaxCollectors.description: The town property tax collector(s) for the loan.

townTaxEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the town taxes are escrowed

townTaxMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for town taxes

trackingToWarehouse.description: Tracking number for the shipment of collateral to the warehouse lender.

treatNegativeNonSubjectPropertyRentalInc.description: Indicates whether the cumulative negative rental income on the loan should be used as a monthly obligation in DTI calculation. Computed automatically based on mortgage type (VA is true, all others are false), but can be manually overridden.
Metadata for the treat negative non-subject property rental income as monthly obligation indicator computed field, including override status and value provenance.

treatNegativeSubjectPropertyRentalIncome.description: Indicates whether the cumulative negative rental income on the loan should be used as a monthly obligation in DTI calculation. Computed automatically based on mortgage type (VA is true, all others are false), but can be manually overridden.
Metadata for the treat negative subject property rental income as monthly obligation indicator computed field, including override status and value provenance.

tridTriggeredDate.description: Date that TRID was triggered by all borrowers in UTC-8. If multiple borrowers triggered TRID on different dates, this should be the latest of the borrower trigger dates

tridTriggeredDateMetadata.description: Metadata tracking the computed and override values for the TRID triggered date

tridTriggeredDateTimestamp.description: Date time that TRID was triggered, stored in UTC. This is used to determine tridTriggeredDate, which is the date-only version of this field

trusteeCompanies.description: The trustee company(ies) for the loan.

ucdGeneratedDateTime.description: The date and time the most recent UCD XML was generated

underwriterNote.description: Comments or notes recorded by an underwriter regarding the loan decision or underwriting process

underwriterNoteLastModifiedAt.description: The date and time when the underwriter note was last modified

underwritingExceptions.description: Represent exceptions to underwriting rules that can be approved, approved with conditions, or denied

underwritingExceptionScenarioStatus.description: Tracks the scenario status for underwriting exceptions, indicating whether changes have occurred that require underwriter review.

underwritingMRIContributionAmount.description: The amount of qualified usable funds eligible to be considered for minimum required investment requirements.

underwritingPolicy.description: The policy rule that the loan falls under as defined by an administrator.

underwrittenUsingDSCRIndicator.description: Indicates whether the loan is being underwritten on the basis of the Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR)

universalLoanIdentifier.description: The computed universal loan identifier for HMDA reporting, based on a lender's legal entity identifier and the loan number

unpaidBalanceAtTimeOfSale.description: The remaining balance on the loan at the time it was sold to an investor

updateIlapldScenarioStatus.description: Tracks the scenario status for ILAPLD updates, indicating whether changes have occurred that may require updating the ILAPLD system.

upfrontDepositRemaining.description: The amount remaining of any upfront deposits after allocations and refunds have been applied

upfrontFHAMipFinanceIndicator.description: Indicates whether the upfront FHA MIP is being financed

upfrontFHAMortgageInsurancePremiumAmount.description: The upfront FHA mortgage insurance premium amount due at closing

upfrontFHAMortgageInsurancePremiumRefund.description: The amount of refund due to the borrower for an FHA to FHA refinance. To calculate a value, populate the original note amount, first payment date, and disbursement date.
Metadata tracking the computed and override values for the upfront FHA mortgage insurance premium refund amount

upfrontInsuranceFeesPaidDate.description: Date the MI upfront premium is paid, or the FHA MIP is paid to HUD, or VA funding fee is paid to the VA, or the USDA guarantee fee is paid to the USDA

upfrontMIPOrFFRefundableProRataIndicator.description: Indicates that if the mortgage insurance is terminated early, e.g. via refinance or payment ahead of schedule, that the upfront premium will be refunded to the payer on a pro-rata basis

upfrontUSDAGuaranteeFeeEstimate.description: An estimate of the upfront USDA guarantee fee, before the actual guarantee fee has been determined

upfrontVAFundingFeeEstimate.description: An estimate of the upfront VA funding fee, before the actual funding fee has been determined

usdaAdjustedHouseholdAnnualIncome.description: Total household annual income, net of deductions permitted by USDA guidelines

usdaAnnualChildCareExpenses.description: Annual unreimbursed child care expenses for children age 12 and under that enable a household member to work, seek employment, or attend school. Amount entered should not exceed the earned income of the household member enabled to work by the care.

usdaAnnualDisabilityExpenses.description: Annual unreimbursed disability-related expenses that enable a household member to work. Should not exceed the enabled worker's earned income. Combined with medical expenses and subject to a 3% of annual income threshold when calculating adjusted annual income.

usdaAnnualIncomeLimit.description: Maximum annual household income allowed for USDA Guaranteed loan eligibility, based on household size and the area where the subject property is located. Corresponds to the MOD.INC-GUAR.LOAN tier published annually by USDA Rural Development.

usdaAnnualMedicalExpenses.description: Annual unreimbursed medical expenses for the entire household. Only applicable when at least one borrower is age 62 or older or disabled. Combined with disability expenses and subject to a 3% of annual income threshold when calculating adjusted annual income.

usdaCaseNumber.description: This loan's case number as assigned by the USDA

usdaGuaranteeFeeFinancedIndicator.description: Indicates whether any of the upfront USDA guarantee fee is being financed

usdaGuaranteeFeeMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for the USDA Annual Fee

usdaGuaranteeFeePartiallyFinancedAmount.description: The amount of the upfront USDA guarantee fee that is being partially financed

usdaGuaranteeFeePartiallyFinancedIndicat.description: Indicates whether the upfront USDA guarantee fee is being partially financed

usdaRefinanceType.description: The applicable USDA refinance program: Streamlined, Non-Streamlined, or Streamlined-Assist

useActualDisbursementDate.description: Indicates whether the actual disbursement date will be used for all prepaid interest and disclosures. This will not update first payment date.

useActualDisbursementDateMetadata.description: Metadata for the computed field that determines whether to use the actual disbursement date for prepaid interest and disclosures

useActualMinusOneDay.description: For California loans, indicates whether prepaid interest should use the actual disbursement date minus one day when actual disbursement is later than scheduled disbursement.

useActualMinusOneDayMetadata.description: Metadata for the computed field that determines whether to use actual disbursement date minus one day for prepaid interest

userEnteredFannieMaeInvestorFeatureCodes.description: Fannie Mae specified identifiers used to identify loan features. These should be entered by the lender and will be combined with the inferred identifiers when they're sent to Fannie Mae

userEnteredFreddieMacInvestorFeatureCode.description: Freddie Mac specified identifiers used to identify loan features. These should be entered by the lender and will be combined with the inferred identifiers when they're sent to Freddie Mac

userLastModifiedAt.description: The date and time the loan was last modified by a user

userLastModifiedBy.description: The user who last modified the loan

vaAgencyCaseNumber.description: This loan's case number for VA

vaCoBorrowerMarriedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the co-borrower is married to the borrower. Used for VA loans only

vaFundingFeeFinancedIndicator.description: Indicates whether any of the VA funding fee is being financed

vaFundingFeePartiallyFinancedAmount.description: The amount of the upfront VA funding fee that is being partially financed

vaFundingFeePartiallyFinancedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the VA funding fee is being partially financed

vaIrrrlAmountExceedingRecoupmentPeriod.description: Total dollar amount exceeding the allowed 36-month VA recoupment period

vaIrrrlRecoupmentPeriodInMonths.description: Recoupment period for this loan, as defined by VA guidelines (fees, expenses, and closing costs, excluding prepaids, initial escrow payments, and VA funding fee, all divided by the monthly payment difference between the new and previous loan).

vaPriorApprovalRequired.description: Lender must submit the loan package to the VA for underwriting and review before the loan can close

vaRefinanceType.description: The type of VA refinance, such as cash-out, IRRRL

vaResidualIncomeGuidelineAmount.description: The dollar amount used as a guideline for assessing residual income for VA loans, based on household size and region of the subject property

vaResidualIncomeGuidelineAmountEstimate.description: The estimated dollar amount used as a guideline for assessing residual income for VA loans, based on household size and region of the subject property

varianceToExpectedPurchaseAdvicePrice.description: The percentage difference between the expected purchase price and the actual purchase advice price, indicating how much the actual price deviates from the expected price

varianceToExpectedPurchaseAdvicePriceInD.description: The dollar difference between the expected purchase price and the actual purchase advice price

villagePropertyTaxCollectors.description: The village property tax collector(s) for the loan.

villageTaxEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the village taxes are escrowed

villageTaxMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for village taxes

volcanoInsuranceEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the volcano insurance is escrowed

volcanoInsuranceMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for volcano insurance

waterSewerAssessmentEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the water sewer assessment is escrowed

waterSewerAssessmentMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for water sewer assessments

windAndHailInsuranceEscrowedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the wind and hail insurance is escrowed

windAndHailInsuranceMonthlyPayment.description: The monthly payment for wind and hail insurance

withdrawalNoticeInitialSentDate.description: Date the first withdrawal notice was sent to the borrower

$action.description: Only used for adding and removing items from a collection

apiIdentifier.description: The unique identifier used for API integrations with this capital partner.

companyName.description: The name of the capital partner company.

email.description: The email address for the capital partner.

fannieMaeId.description: The unique identifier assigned to this capital partner by Fannie Mae.

fhaIdentifier.description: The unique identifier assigned to this capital partner by the Federal Housing Administration.

freddieMacId.description: The unique identifier assigned to this capital partner by Freddie Mac.

integrationType.description: The type of integration configured for this capital partner.

mersInterimFunderId.description: The unique identifier assigned to this capital partner as an interim funder in the MERS (Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems) system.

mersType.description: The MERS registration type for this capital partner (e.g., Interim Funder or Gestational Lender).

nmlsId.description: The unique identifier assigned to this capital partner in the Nationwide Multistate Licensing System (NMLS).

notes.description: Additional notes or comments about this capital partner.

partnerType.description: The type or category of the capital partner.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number for the capital partner.

stateOfIncorporation.description: The US state where the capital partner company was incorporated.

vaAgentId.description: A unique ID provided by the VA for an agent (mortgage broker). An Agent is a person or entity that performs any activity on behalf of, or in the name of, a sponsoring lender.

vaIdentifier.description: The unique identifier assigned to this capital partner by the Department of Veterans Affairs.

warehouseLenderDefaultAdvancePercent.description: The default percentage of the loan amount that the warehouse lender will advance to fund the loan.

$action.description: Only used for adding and removing items from a collection

borrowerReceiptEvents.description: Collection of receipt events for each borrower, tracking when they received, signed, or when the document expired.

capitalPartnerName.description: The name of the capital partner associated with this delivery.

complianceRecordedTimestamp.description: The timestamp at which a compliance integration recorded the delivery of this document.

deliveryType.description: The type of document or disclosure being delivered.

disclosureStatus.description: The status of the disclosure delivery (e.g., Sent, Completed, Expired).

electronicToPaperSentTimestamp.description: The timestamp when the delivery was sent via paper after being dropped from electronic delivery.

expirationDate.description: The date when the delivered disclosure or document expires.

manualDisclosureStatus.description: The status of manually delivered disclosures tracked outside of the electronic delivery system.

nonBorrowingRelatedPartyReceiptEvents.description: Collection of receipt events for each non-borrowing related party, tracking when they received, signed, or when the document expired.

presumedReceivedTimestamp.description: The estimated timestamp when the delivery was received, computed when no actual receipt confirmation is available.

recipientPresumedReceipts.description: Collection of per-recipient presumed receipt information, tracking the computed presumed received date for each borrower and non-borrowing related party.

sentTimestamp.description: The timestamp when the delivery was initially sent to recipients.

ssplDelivered.description: Indicates whether a Settlement Service Provider List was delivered with this loan estimate.

$action.description: Only used for adding and removing items from a collection

effectiveDate.description: The date when the loan modification becomes effective

firstPaymentDate.description: The date when the first payment is due after the loan modification

loanAmortizationMonthsCount.description: The number of months over which the modified loan will be amortized

loanAmortizationType.description: The type of amortization for the modified loan

loanAmount.description: The principal balance of the loan at the time of modification

maturityDate.description: The new date when the loan is scheduled to be paid in full after modification

noteRate.description: The new interest rate applied to the loan after modification

$action.description: Only used for adding and removing items from a collection

createdAt.description: The date and time when this payment record was created

dueDate.description: The date the payment was due

escrowAmountPaid.description: The amount of the payment applied to the escrow account

escrowBalanceAfterReceipt.description: The balance of the escrow account after this payment was applied

interestAmountPaid.description: The amount of the payment applied to the interest portion of the loan

outstandingPrincipalBalanceAfterReceipt.description: The remaining principal balance of the loan after this payment was applied

principalAmountPaid.description: The amount of the payment applied to the principal balance of the loan

receivedAmount.description: The total amount received for this payment

receivedDate.description: The date the payment was received

$action.description: Only used for adding and removing items from a collection

dueDate.description: The date the payment was due

escrowAmountPaid.description: The amount of the payment applied to the escrow account

escrowBalanceAfterReceipt.description: The balance of the escrow account after this payment was applied

interestAmountPaid.description: The amount of the payment applied to the interest portion of the loan

outstandingPrincipalBalanceAfterReceipt.description: The remaining principal balance of the loan after this payment was applied

principalAmountPaid.description: The amount of the payment applied to the principal balance of the loan

$action.description: Only used for adding and removing items from a collection

dueDate.description: The date the payment was due

escrowAmountPaid.description: The amount of the payment applied to the escrow account

escrowBalanceAfterReceipt.description: The balance of the escrow account after this payment was applied

interestAmountPaid.description: The amount of the payment applied to the interest portion of the loan

outstandingPrincipalBalanceAfterReceipt.description: The remaining principal balance of the loan after this payment was applied

principalAmountPaid.description: The amount of the payment applied to the principal balance of the loan

actualGainLossAmount.description: The actual financial gain or loss in dollars realized on the loan transaction

actualGainLossPoints.description: The actual gain or loss expressed as a percentage of the loan amount

adpCode.description: The unique identifier for the Automated Data Processing (ADP) code used for Direct Endorsement (DE) processing of FHA loans.

adpCodeMetadata.description: Metadata about how the ADP code value was computed or overridden.

alternativeIncomeDocumentationNumberOfMo.description: Number of months for the selected alternative income verification type.

alternativeIncomeVerificationType.description: The income verification method applied to this loan if it is a non-qualified mortgage.

alternativeLoanOptions.description: Alternative loan options considered by the broker for this borrower. Used to generate the anti-steering disclosure for brokers.

amiBasedLLPAWaiverEligible.description: Indicates whether the loan qualifies for a waiver of loan-level price adjustments (LLPAs) based on the borrower's area median income (AMI)

annualPercentageRate.description: Annual percentage rate as calculated inclusive of applicable fees

annualPercentageRateEstimate.description: An estimate of the annual percentage rate (APR) provided by the user before one is able to be calculatd.

annualPercentageRateMetadata.description: Metadata about how the annual percentage rate value was computed or overridden.

approvedExceptionCategories.description: The underwriting exception categories that were approved and sent to the pricing engine

armAdjustmentBasisIndex.description: For adjustable rate mortgages only. The index rate that is used to calculate the new interest rate each time it is adjusted

armDisclosedIndexRate.description: The value of the index rate that was disclosed at origination

armFirstRateChangeDate.description: The first date the loan's interest rate is scheduled to adjust after the initial fixed-rate period. For FHA/VA ARMs delivered to GNMA, this date is aligned to the applicable quarterly GNMA adjustment block (Jan, Apr, Jul, Oct) per delivery lead-time rules.

armFirstRateChangeDateMetadata.description: Metadata about how the ARM first rate change date value was computed or overridden.

armInitialDecreaseCap.description: For adjustable rate mortgages only. The largest rate decrease allowed at the first adjustment period

armInitialFixedPeriodTermMonthsCount.description: For adjustable rate mortgages only. The initial period, in months, for which the interest rate is fixed

armInitialIncreaseCap.description: For adjustable rate mortgages only. The largest rate increase allowed at the first adjustment period

armLifetimeDecreaseCap.description: For adjustable rate mortgages only. The maximum total cumulative rate decrease allowed over the course of the loan

armLifetimeIncreaseCap.description: For adjustable rate mortgages only. The maximum total cumulative rate increase allowed over the course of the loan

armMarginAdjustments.description: Adjustments originating from pricing engine which represent change directly to the ARM margin rate on a loan

armMarginRate.description: The margin that is added to the index rate when the new rate adjustment is calculated

armPeriodicDecreaseCap.description: For adjustable rate mortgages only. The largest rate decrease allowed at each adjustment period subsequent to the first

armPeriodicIncreaseCap.description: For adjustable rate mortgages only. The largest rate increase allowed at each adjustment period subsequent to the first

armQualifyingRate.description: The interest rate used to calculate the monthly payment for qualification purposes

armRateAdjustmentFrequencyMonthsCount.description: For adjustable rate mortgages only. The subsequent period length, in months, after which the interest rate is regularly adjusted

assumabilityIndicator.description: Indicates whether the loan is assumable by another borrower

balloonIndicator.description: Indicates that a final balloon payment is required to fully pay off the loan.

balloonPaymentAmount.description: The dollar amount of the final, or lump sum, balloon payment

basePrice.description: The buy-side price of the loan excluding all fees, LLPAs, adjustments and markups.

bestEffortsPrice.description: The price at which a lender commits to selling a mortgage loan to an investor on a best efforts basis.

bonaFideDiscountPoints.description: Discount points, expressed as a percentage of the loan amount, paid by the borrower to reduce the interest rate and meet regulatory requirements

borrowerFinancedFHADiscountPoints.description: Discount points financed by the borrower, used only in FHA loans.

borrowerPaidCompensationCalculationMetho.description: Determines how the borrower-paid LO/broker compensation is calculated

borrowerPaidCompensationDollarAmount.description: Fixed dollar amount paid to the LO/broker, by the borrower, as part of their compensation

borrowerPaidCompensationPercent.description: Fixed percentage of loan amount paid to the LO/broker, by the borrower, as part of their compensation

borrowerPaidCompensationTotalCompensatio.description: Total amount earned by the LO/broker that was paid by the borrower

branchMarkups.description: Markups originating from the pricing engine at the branch level

brokeringThisLoan.description: Indicates whether the loan is being brokered through a wholesale lender.

buydownInitialEffectiveInterestRatePerce.description: The effective interest rate after applying the initial buydown reduction.

closingAdjustments.description: A list of all buyer related closing adjustments on the loan

committedInvestor.description: The investor to whom the loan has been committed for sale in the secondary market.

committedInvestorMetadata.description: Metadata about how the committed investor value was computed or overridden.

comparableNoPrepaymentLoanFees.description: The fees for this loan if it had no prepayment penalty. Required for California loans with a prepayment penalty

comparableNoPrepaymentLoanInterestRate.description: The interest rate for this loan if it had no prepayment penalty. Required for California loans with a prepayment penalty

comparableNoPrepaymentLoanPoints.description: The discount points for this loan if it had no prepayment penalty. Required for California loans with a prepayment penalty

compensationPaidByType.description: Whether the lender or borrower is paying compensation to the LO/broker. This field is for LO compensation in retail channels, and broker compensation in broker or wholesale channels.

compensationPlanName.description: Name of the LO or broker's compensation plan paid by the lender

conversionScheduleType.description: Describes when the loan is eligible to convert

convertibleIndicator.description: Indicates whether the ARM can be converted to a fixed rate

creditorServicingOfLoanStatementType.description: Does the creditor intend to service the loan or transfer servicing

deficiencyRightsPreservedIndicator.description: When true, indicates that upon the foreclosure sale completion, deficiency rights against the borrowers are preserved

deliveryCommitmentType.description: Specifies whether the loan is committed on a mandatory or best efforts basis for sale in the secondary market.

demandFeatureIndicator.description: When true, indicates that the loan has a demand feature, which permits the creditor to demand early repayment of the loan

discountPointsExcludedUnderRegZIndicator.description: Specifies whether discount points are excluded from APR calculations as allowed under Regulation Z.

dutyToServeProductIndicator.description: Indicates whether the selected loan product is a Duty to Serve product

effectiveRateSheetDateTime.description: Date and time of the published rate sheet used to price the loan product

effectiveRateSheetIdentifier.description: The unique identifier for the rate sheet used to price the loan

effectiveRateSheetLockPeriod.description: The rate lock period of the effective rate sheet used for pricing. This could differ from the loan's actual lock period in the event of worse case pricing during a relock.

employeeLoanProgramIndicator.description: When true, indicates that the loan is an employee loan

escrowAccountRequirementWaivedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the requirement for an escrow account has been waived.

fhaSectionOfActType.description: Section of the National Housing Act which defines underwriting guidelines for FHA loans.

firstLienAmount.description: The outstanding amount on the first lien for the subject property, sourced from either liability or concurrent financing. Only used if lienType is second lien or higher.

firstLienAmountEstimate.description: Estimated first lien amount for the subject property. Only used if lienType is second lien or higher.

firstLienAmountMetadata.description: Metadata about how the first lien amount value was computed or overridden.

gainLossAmount.description: The projected financial gain or loss in dollars on the loan transaction

gainLossPoints.description: The projected gain or loss expressed as a percentage of the loan amount

hasOtherNonAmortizingTerms.description: Does this loan have other non-amortizing terms?

hedgedLoanIndicator.description: Indicates whether this loan was hedged as part of a secondary market strategy

helocAnnualFee.description: The dollar amount of an annual fee associated with the loan and charged to the borrower

helocAnnualFeeWaivedInFirstYearIndicator.description: Indicates whether the annual fee is waived in the first year of the HELOC

helocCreditLimit.description: The maximum amount of credit available to the borrower under the HELOC agreement

helocDrawAmortizationType.description: Specifies the repayment method for amounts drawn during the HELOC draw period: interest-only or principal and interest

helocDrawFee.description: The dollar amount of the transaction fee, including any minimum fee or per-transaction fee that will be charged for a draw on the HELOC.

helocDrawPeriodInMonths.description: The period (in months) during which the borrower can draw funds from the HELOC before the repayment period begins

helocInitialDrawAmount.description: The amount the borrower will draw from the HELOC at closing

helocLineFixedOrFloating.description: Indicates whether the HELOC has a fixed interest rate or a floating (variable) interest rate

helocMinimumDrawSize.description: The minimum amount that can be withdrawn in a single draw from the HELOC

helocNumberOfOutstandingDrawsLimit.description: The maximum number of draws that can be outstanding at any given time during the HELOC draw period

helocRepaymentPeriodInMonths.description: The period (in months) allotted for the borrower to repay the HELOC after the draw period ends. This is calculated as the full term of the loan minus the draw period.

helocRepaymentPeriodInMonthsMetadata.description: Metadata about how the HELOC repayment period in months value was computed or overridden.

helocReturnedCheckFee.description: The amount that can be charged in the case of a payment made on the HELOC loan being returned for non-sufficient funds.

helocStopPaymentFee.description: The amount that can be charged when a stop payment is made on a HELOC loan payment

helocTeaserPeriodInMonths.description: The number of months the introductory teaser rate remains in effect before adjusting to the standard interest rate

helocTeaserRate.description: A temporary, introductory interest rate offered on the HELOC for a specified period which subsequently adjusts to the standard rate

helocTerminationFee.description: The fee amount charged when the HELOC transaction is paid off early.

hoepaAnnualPercentageRate.description: Annual percentage rate for HOEPA determination

hoepaPointsAndFeesThreshold.description: Total points and fees threshold for HOEPA determination

hpmlRateThreshold.description: Annual percentage rate threshold for HOEPA determination

indexLookbackDays.description: The number of days prior to the interest rate adjustment date that the index value is referenced for an adjustable-rate mortgage (ARM).

interestOnlyIndicator.description: Indicates that the loan terms allow interest-only payments to be made for a specified time period. For HELOCs, this indicates that the draw period is interest only.

interestOnlyTermMonthsCount.description: For interest only mortgages only. The length of the initial interest only period, in months

interestRateBuydownDepositAmount.description: The total amount deposited to fund an interest rate buydown used to reduce the interest rate for a set period.

interestRateBuydownFundingSource.description: Identifies the entity providing the funds for the interest rate buydown, such as the Borrower, Builder, Employer, Lender, Seller, or Other.

interestRateBuydownFundingSourceOtherDes.description: A description of the buydown funding source if Other is selected

interestRateBuydownPlan.description: The type of buydown plan used for this loan

investorBasePrice.description: The investor base price of the loan

investorName.description: The investor to whom the loan is intended to be sold under a best efforts delivery commitment

investorNoteRate.description: The interest rate agreed upon with the investor for this loan

investorProductCode.description: The investor product code associated with the investor loan program

investorProductPlanCode.description: Set by the pricing engine, the code of the investor plan

investorProgramName.description: The name of the investor loan program

investorRateLockExtensions.description: A list of investor rate lock extension granted by the investor beyond the original rate lock period

investorRateLockInitiatedDate.description: The date when the investor rate lock was initiated for this loan

investorRateLockPeriod.description: The investor's original rate lock period for this loan

investorRateSheetIdentifier.description: The unique identifier for the investor's rate sheet associated with this loan

lateChargeFixedAmount.description: The dollar amount that a borrower is required to pay for failure to make a regular installment within the period specified on the note. This is used when late charge is defined as a flat dollar amount

lateChargeGracePeriodInDays.description: The grace period in days for this loan before a late charge will be applied

lateChargeMaximumAmount.description: The maximum monthly late charge amount allowed

lateChargeMinimumAmount.description: The minimum monthly late charge amount allowed

lateChargePercentage.description: The percentage that a borrower is required to pay for failure to make a regular installment within the period specified on the note. This is a percentage of the amount specified by the late charge type and is used when the late charge is not a flat dollar

lateChargeType.description: The type of late charge that may be applied to the loan. This field also describes the way a late charge on this loan would be calculated

leadSourceId.description: Identifier for the marketing or referral source associated with loan pricing.

lienType.description: Describes the lien priority of the subject mortgage

loanAmortizationMonthsCount.description: How long the loan takes to fully amortize to 0. Note that this is almost always the same as the Term in months. If it is greater than that number, there is a balloon payment at the end

loanAmortizationType.description: Describes the amortization type - fixed rate, ARM, etc - of the subject mortgage

loanAmountIncreaseIndicator.description: When true, indicates that the loan amount can increase after closing

loanOfficerPrice.description: The price of the loan including all fees, LLPAs, adjustments and markups.

loanTermMonthsCount.description: The loan term, measured in months (e.g. a 30 year loan would have 360 here)

loCompensationDollarAmount.description: Fixed dollar amount paid to the LO/broker by the lender as part of their compensation. This field is for LO compensation in retail channels, and broker compensation in broker or wholesale channels.

loCompensationMaxCap.description: Maximum compensation paid by the lender for the LO/broker. This field is for LO compensation in retail channels, and broker compensation in broker or wholesale channels.

loCompensationMinCap.description: Minimum compensation paid by the lender for the LO/broker. This field is for LO compensation in retail channels, and broker compensation in broker or wholesale channels.

loCompensationNetDollarAmount.description: Total amount earned by the LO/broker that was paid by the lender, including both percentage and fixed compensation. This field is for LO compensation in retail channels, and broker compensation in broker or wholesale channels.

loCompensationPercent.description: Fixed percentage of loan amount paid to the LO/broker by the lender as part of their compensation. This field is for LO compensation in retail channels, and broker compensation in broker or wholesale channels.

manualARMMarginAdjustments.description: Adjustments manually applied to the margin of an adjustable-rate mortgage (ARM).

manualMarkups.description: Markups manually added by the user

manualPriceAdjustments.description: Manual adjustments representing change to the points on a loan

manualRateAdjustments.description: Manual adjustments representing change directly to the interest rate on a loan

markups.description: Markups originating from the pricing engine

mortgageInvestorGuidelinesType.description: The investor whose guidelines the loan will be underwritten to

mortgageSizeType.description: Describes the size of the subject mortgage - conforming, jumbo, etc

mortgageType.description: Describes the mortgage type - FHA, conventional, etc - of the subject mortgage

needsToBeReportedAsHOEPAIndicator.description: Indicates that this is classified as a high cost loan under HOEPA, which has certain APR and points/fees triggers

needsToBeReportedAsHOEPAIndicatorMetadat.description: Metadata about how the needs to be reported as HOEPA indicator value was computed or overridden.

needsToBeReportedAsHPMLIndicator.description: Indicates that the loan's APR exceeds the HPML rate threshold and must be reported as a higher-priced mortgage loan (HPML) under MDIA regulations.

needsToBeReportedAsHPMLIndicatorMetadata.description: Metadata about how the needs to be reported as HPML indicator value was computed or overridden.

needsToBeReportedAsQMHighCostIndicator.description: Indicates that the loan exceeds the Qualified Mortgage (QM) high cost threshold and must be reported as a high cost loan under QM regulations.

needsToBeReportedAsQMHighCostIndicatorMe.description: Metadata about how the needs to be reported as QM high cost indicator value was computed or overridden.

needsToBeReportedAsQMHighPricedIndicator.description: Indicates that the loan exceeds the Qualified Mortgage (QM) higher-priced threshold and must be reported as a higher-priced loan under QM regulations.
Metadata about how the needs to be reported as QM higher-priced indicator value was computed or overridden.

negativeAmortizationType.description: Whether there is any negative amortization on this loan, either potential or scheduled, and which type if so

noteRate.description: Interest rate as it will appear on the mortgage note

otherLoanAmortization.description: Further describes the amortization type of the subject mortgage, if it is not one of the predefined types

otherMortgageInvestorGuidelines.description: The investor whose guidelines the loan will be underwritten to, if not in the prescribed list

parRate.description: The interest rate at which a loan would be offered with no discount points or lender credits

partialPaymentAllowedIndicator.description: Indicates that the terms of the loan allow principal and interest payments that are less than the amount due.

partialPaymentApplicationMethodType.description: The method used for applying a partial payment to the loan.

paymentIncreaseIndicator.description: When true, indicates that the payments on the loan can increase after the closing

postAdjustedParPoints.description: The par points after applying all adjustments

postAdjustedParPrice.description: The par price after applying all adjustments

postAdjustedParRate.description: The interest rate at which the loan would be offered with no discount points or lender credits after applying all adjustments

prepaymentCalculationTerms.description: Defines the terms used to calculate a prepayment penalty including method, timeframe, and applicable conditions.

prepaymentExpirationMonthCount.description: The number of months from the loan closing that a prepayment penalty may be imposed. Determined by the longest prepayment penalty months across all calculation terms

prepaymentFinanceChargeRefundableIndicat.description: Indicates whether the finance charge is refundable if the loan is paid off early.

prepaymentPenaltyDescription.description: The selected prepayment penalty template name

prepaymentPenaltyExpirationDate.description: The last date when a prepayment penalty may be imposed on the loan

prepaymentPenaltyIndicator.description: Indicates whether the loan includes a penalty charged to the borrower in the event of prepayment

prepaymentPenaltyLifetimeMaximumAmount.description: Maximum dollar amount that can be charged as a prepayment penalty over the life of the loan

prepaymentPenaltyWaivedAmount.description: The total amount of the prepayment penalty that was incurred but waived

prepaymentPenaltyWaivedIndicator.description: Indicates whether the prepayment penalty has been waived

prepaymentPenaltyWaivedReasonDescription.description: Describes the reason why a prepayment penalty due from a borrower was waived

prepaymentPenaltyWaiverType.description: Denotes conditions under which the prepayment penalty is waived

priceAdjustments.description: Adjustments originating from pricing engine which represent change to the points on a loan

pricingEngine.description: The pricing engine used to price the loan

pricingEngineARMMarginRate.description: The margin that is added to the index rate when the new rate adjustment is calculated

pricingEngineNoteRate.description: The note rate before manual adjustments are applied

pricingEnginePoints.description: Discount points before applying manual adjustments

pricingErrorMessage.description: The error message returned from the pricing engine when a pricing call to retrieve loan products fails.

pricingLeadSource.description: The lead source used to determine loan pricing.

productCode.description: The product code associated with the loan product selected for this loan.

programEligibilityFailures.description: List of guideline failures that make the selected loan product ineligible

programName.description: The name of the specific loan program applicable to this loan

qmHighCostThreshold.description: The threshold for a high cost mortgage

qmHighPricedThreshold.description: The threshold for a high priced mortgage

quotedAtDateTime.description: Date and time when the selected loan product was effectively quoted, which may not match the effective rate sheet date and time used to price the loan product

rateAdjustments.description: Adjustments originating from pricing engine which represent change directly to the interest rate on a loan

rateExpiresAt.description: Date when the selected price quote expires

rateLockCancelledDate.description: The date on which the rate lock was cancelled

rateLockComments.description: Additional notes or comments related to the loan's rate lock.

rateLockedDate.description: The date on which the rate lock started

rateLockExpiresDate.description: The date on which the rate lock expires

rateLockExtensions.description: A list of rate lock extension granted beyond the original rate lock period.

rateLockPeriod.description: The number of days that the rate lock is in place for

rateLockRequestedDate.description: The date on which the rate lock was requested

rateLockStatus.description: The status of the rate lock

rateRoundingMethod.description: Specifies how the interest rate is rounded (e.g. nearest 1/8, nearest 1/4)

rateSetDateTime.description: Date and time when a loan's interest rate is locked or finalized, used to determine the applicable APOR for HMDA rate spread calculations

rateSpread.description: Difference between annual percentage rate and the average prime offer rate

rateSpreadEstimate.description: The difference between the loan's Annual Percentage Rate (APR) and the Average Prime Offer Rate (APOR), used to assess whether the loan is considered a Higher-Priced Mortgage Loan (HPML). The estimate is provided by the user before it is able to be calculated.

rawPrice.description: The buy-side price of the loan including markups, but excluding all fees, LLPAs, and adjustments.

regZExcludedDiscountPoints.description: The bona fide discount points, expressed as a percent, that are excluded from points and fees calculated in accordance with Regulation Z, Truth in Lending

regZTotalPointsAndFees.description: The total amount of points and fees, expressed in dollars, calculated in accordance with Regulation Z, Truth in Lending

regZTotalPointsAndFeesMetadata.description: Metadata about how the RegZ total points and fees value was computed or overridden.

relocationLoanProgramIndicator.description: Indicates if the loan is part of a corporate relocation program

seasonalPaymentFeatureIndicator.description: When true, indicates the loan contains a seasonal payment feature

secondaryAlternativeIncomeVerificationTy.description: The secondary income verification method applied to this loan if it is a non-qualified mortgage

sellSideLockExpirationDateTime.description: The expiration date and time of the sell-side rate lock

sellSidePriceAdjustments.description: A list of sell-side price adjustments applied by the investor

sellSideRateAdjustments.description: A list of sell-side rate adjustments applied by the investor

servicingRightsAmount.description: The dollar amount associated with the mortgage servicing rights (MSRs) for this loan, based on servicingRightsPercent * UPB

servicingRightsPercent.description: The percentage of the loan's unpaid principal balance (UPB) at time of sale that represents the value of the servicing rights. This is typically used in pricing and reflects the Service Release Premium (SRP) quote when servicing is released or the Mortgage Servicing Rights (MSR) valuation if retained

specialGSEProgramTypes.description: The special Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac programs that are applicable to this loan

specialRateLockOptions.description: A description of any unique rate lock provisions for the loan.

srpAdjustments.description: SRP (Service Release Premiums) adjustments originating from pricing engine

tbaCouponRate.description: The coupon rate of the TBA (To-Be-Announced) security associated with the hedge for this loan

texasRefinanceType.description: The type of Texas refinance (e.g. Section 50A4, Section 50A6)

totalArmMarginAdjustments.description: Sum of all ARM margin adjustments (pricing engine + manual)

totalConcessions.description: The net dollar value of all price concessions on the loan

totalConcessionsInPoints.description: Total price concessions given to the borrower

totalInvestorLockExtensionDays.description: Total number of investor lock extension days applied on the loan

totalLockExtensionDays.description: Total number of lock extension days applied on the loan

totalMarkups.description: The total percentage markup applied to the loan price

totalMarkupsInDollars.description: The total dollar amount of markups applied to the loan price

totalPriceAdjustments.description: Sum of all price adjustments (pricing engine + manual)

totalRateAdjustments.description: Sum of all rate adjustments (pricing engine + manual)

totalSrpAdjustments.description: Sum of all SRP adjustments (pricing engine + manual)

useInterestOnlyPaymentForQualifyingIndic.description: When true, indicates that the interest only payment should be used as the qualifying payment for ratios such as DTI

vaSectionOfActType.description: Section of the National Housing Act which defines underwriting guidelines for VA loans.

warehouseLenderIndicator.description: Indicates that the loan is being originated using a warehouse line of credit

$action.description: Only used for adding and removing items from a collection
Only used for adding and removing items from a collection
Only used for adding and removing items from a collection

branchName.description: The name of the branch if the branch type is other

branchType.description: Describes which branch the borrower served in

filedClaimPriorToDischarge.description: Indicates whether the borrower filed a claim for VA disability benefits prior to discharge from active duty

militaryServiceNumber.description: The borrower's military service number if different from their SSN

militaryServiceNumberDifferentFromSSN.description: Indicates whether the borrower's military service number is different from their SSN

personnelType.description: The type of personnel the borrower served as (Officer, Enlisted)

servedAsAnAliasDifferentFromBorrowerName.description: Indicates whether the borrower served as an alias different from their name

serviceEndDate.description: The date the borrower's service ended on if status is veteran, separated, or reserve national guard never activated

serviceServedAsName.description: The alias the borrower served under if different from the borrower name

serviceStartDate.description: The date the borrower's service started on

statusType.description: Describes the status of the borrower's military service

$action.description: Only used for adding and removing items from a collection

entityName.description: The name of the entity that owns multiple units

isDeveloperOrSponsorIndicator.description: Indicates that the entity is the developer or sponsor of the project

leasedAtMarketNumberUnits.description: The number of units owned by this entity that are leased at market rate

leasedRentControlledNumberUnits.description: The number of units owned by this entity that are leased at rent-controlled rates

ownedNumberUnits.description: The total number of units owned by this entity in the project

conditionTemplate.description: Optional condition template configuration for document required and simple condition tasks.

documentTypeId.description: The document type ID for the document required task. This field is required for document required tasks.

entityId.description:
The entity ID to apply the task to. This field is required for document required tasks. For instructions or
simple condition tasks, this field is optional in API versions 26.2 and earlier and defaults to the loan if
omitted.

entityType.description:
The type of the entity to apply the task to. This field is required for document required tasks. For
instructions or simple condition tasks, this field is optional in API versions 26.2 and earlier and defaults
to the loan if omitted.

externalMessage.description: If the task is a document required task, this overrides the template's external message.

instructions.description: The instructions for the instructions or simple condition task. This field is required for instructions or simple condition tasks.

name.description: The name for the instructions or simple condition task. This field is required for instructions tasks.

$action.description: Only used for adding and removing items from a collection

ownerOrTenantName.description: The name of the owner or tenant of the non-residential unit

typeOfUse.description: The type of use or purpose of the non-residential unit

usedNumberOfUnits.description: The number of units used in the non-residential space

usedTotalSquareFootage.description: The total square footage of the non-residential unit

The full name of the assignee.

objective was created manually.

loanNumber.description:
The loan number.

description.description: Description of the other housing expense

isEscrowed.description: Whether the expense is included in the mortgage escrow account

monthlyAmount.description: The monthly dollar amount for this other housing expense

userDecidesDocumentStatus.description:
Document processing task: User decides document status. This is only used if the task is configured to have the user decide the document status.
If this is not provided, the document status will not change if task is configured to have the user decide the document status.
